title: Ontology: add new epistemic/evidence entities to the LLM semantic glossary
description:
Problem
The kernel now treats `reasoning_item`, `assumption`, `open_question`, `evidence_observation`, and `visual_observation` as first-class ontology objects, but the platform semantic glossary does not define them.

Evidence
- ontology/typedb/schema/fragments/20-to-be/10-semantic-core.tql:626-703
- ontology/typedb/docs/semantic-glossary.md:1-35

Why it matters
The schema and the LLM-facing semantic companion diverge, so agents can materialize objects they are not semantically taught to interpret.

Acceptance
- Glossary entries are added for all newly canonical epistemic/evidence entities.
- Definitions distinguish evidence-plane objects from epistemic-plane objects and from task/product/process entities.
close_reason: Resolved: semantic glossary now defines task-only carrier plus new epistemic/evidence first-class entities and their plane boundaries.

Q10. Нужны ли дополнительные роли/доступы сверх текущего “внутренний доступ, read-only не нужен в MVP”?

- Реализация не начиналась (как и просили: «задать вопросы Антону, ничего не делать»).
[2026-03-02] Swarm check: Ontology vs FinOps specs (copilot-081q)

Run mode
- Parent issue: copilot-081q
- Child subtasks:
  - copilot-081q.1 (Sub-agent A / Carson)
  - copilot-081q.2 (Sub-agent B / Mendel)
  - copilot-081q.3 (Sub-agent C / Wegener)
- Ontology anchors (common for all sub-agents):
  - /home/strato-space/copilot/ontology/typedb/schema/str_opsportal_v1.tql
  - /home/strato-space/copilot/ontology/typedb/mappings/mongodb_to_typedb_v1.yaml

A) Scope subsets passed to sub-agents
- Subset A (canonical MVP spec package):
  - /home/strato-space/copilot/projects/stratospace/finance-ops/specifications/002-finance-plan-fact-mvp/spec.md
  - /home/strato-space/copilot/projects/stratospace/finance-ops/specifications/002-finance-plan-fact-mvp/TZ.md
  - /home/strato-space/copilot/projects/stratospace/finance-ops/specifications/002-finance-plan-fact-mvp/data-model.md
  - /home/strato-space/copilot/projects/stratospace/finance-ops/specifications/002-finance-plan-fact-mvp/contracts/api-spec.yaml
- Subset B (Copilot extension docs/specs):
  - /home/strato-space/copilot/docs/FINOPS_REALIZTION.md
  - /home/strato-space/copilot/specs/finops-bonuses.md
  - /home/strato-space/copilot/projects/stratospace/finance-ops/specifications/002-finance-plan-fact-mvp/plan.md
  - /home/strato-space/copilot/projects/stratospace/finance-ops/specifications/002-finance-plan-fact-mvp/tasks.md
- Subset C (sandbox FinOps flow docs):
  - /home/strato-space/y-tasks-sandbox/str-mainflow/finops/01-finops-main.md
  - /home/strato-space/y-tasks-sandbox/str-mainflow/finops/02-finops-rasxod.md
  - /home/strato-space/y-tasks-sandbox/str-mainflow/finops/03-finops-analytic.md
  - /home/strato-space/y-tasks-sandbox/str-mainflow/finops/04-finops-agentsidebar.md

B) Aggregated result (all three sub-agents)

Critical
1. Mapping gap is systemic: core FinOps collections are listed in `missing_spec_collections` and are not ingested into TypeDB.
   - Includes: facts, forecast_versions, project_rates, employee_month_cost, timesheets_monthly, finops_month_closures, agent_requests, alert_settings, audit_events.
2. Forecast mapping/schema inconsistency:
   - Mapping for `forecasts_project_month` emits fields not owned by `forecast_project_month` in schema.
   - Relation role mismatch reported for `project_has_forecast_month` (mapping role does not match schema role expectation).
3. Audit/attachments required by FinOps specs/API are not modeled end-to-end in ontology/mapping.
4. Project metadata extension required by FinOps (`subproject_name`, `contract_type`, `rate_rub_per_hour`, month-level contract type semantics) is not fully represented.

High
1. Fact/Forecast entities are under-modeled against required contracts (hours/rate/fx/manual flags/comments/update provenance).
2. Employee cost and timesheet granularity mismatch:
   - Required split (`hours_actual` vs `hours_billable`) and salary/working-hours/cost-rate contract are not fully represented and not mapped.
3. Cost expense model conflict:
   - subset C (`02-finops-rasxod.md`) states no `project_id` for MVP other expenses, while ontology/mapping enforce project linkage.
4. Agent-request and alert-setting domain contracts are under-modeled and/or unmapped.

Medium
1. Bonus/Fund logic (`specs/finops-bonuses.md`) is formula- and cutoff-heavy; current mapping DSL appears insufficient for reproducible derivations without ETL/precompute.
2. Alerts/notification-center requirements from `04-finops-agentsidebar.md` (fingerprint/tags/read-mute-snooze/context/deeplink/account prefs) exceed current ontology support.
3. Typing/semantic drift:
   - bool-like states mapped into string `status` in places.
   - FX numeric semantics vs current schema typing mismatches.

C) Consolidated proposed changes

P0
- Implement mappings for all core missing FinOps collections and wire required relations (forecast_version/period/fx links).
- Fix forecast relation-role mismatch and align mapping fields with actual schema ownership.
- Extend schema ownership for required Fact/Forecast fields used in specs/contracts.
- Decide and encode MVP rule for expenses without project linkage (optional relation or split models).

P1
- Extend project ontology attributes (contract/subproject/rate/fix-cap/currency/CRM external ids).
- Extend employee-month-cost and timesheet entities to represent required financial and hour semantics.
- Normalize FX model semantics and field typing between specs, schema, and mapping.
- Add generic FinOps audit event model and mapping.

P2
- Add persistent ontology support for bonus/fund policies and monthly allocations if this block is in scope now.
- Extend alerts/notifications ontology for agent-sidebar/account-level behavior.
- Define KPI terminology dictionary to remove “salary-only cost” vs “total cost” drift before codifying analytics rules.

D) Notes
- All findings are from swarm analysis only; no code/schema changes were made in this step.
Documentation update: added docs/FINOPS_SPEC_DISCOVERY.md with consolidated spec inventory (canonical/mirror/sandbox), open scope questions for Anton, and current pending status.
Status updated to blocked: implementation scope remains pending product decisions from Anton (master spec source, MVP boundary, FX/lock/SLA/bonuses role and rollout order). Current output is discovery-only and no implementation should start until answers are provided.

title: Fix Codex bd external_ref collision for multi-task voice sessions
description:
Problem
Codex issue creation from Voice uses the session URL as `bd --external-ref`. When one session materializes multiple Codex tasks, bd rejects the second create with `UNIQUE constraint failed: issues.external_ref`.

Evidence
- `sqlite3 .beads/beads.db ".schema issues"` shows `CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_issues_external_ref_unique ON issues(external_ref) WHERE external_ref IS NOT NULL;`
- `backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/sessions.ts` currently passes the same `canonicalExternalRef` to every Codex issue created from the same session.

Acceptance
1. Root cause is documented in code/tests.
2. Voice->bd Codex issue sync no longer reuses the same bd external_ref for multiple tasks from one session.
3. Session URL remains visible/preserved as source context, but bd external_ref becomes unique per issue.
4. Regression tests cover at least two Codex tasks from the same session without duplicate external_ref failure.
5. No change to canonical Mongo task `external_ref` semantics for voice session linkage.
close_reason: Implemented unique bd external_ref for multi-task voice Codex sync; preserved canonical session link in Mongo and issue description

comments.author: vp
comments.text:
Root cause confirmed:
- bd stores `issues.external_ref` under a partial unique index: `idx_issues_external_ref_unique`.
- Voice `create_tickets` reused the same session URL as `bd --external-ref` for every Codex task created from one session.
- This caused `UNIQUE constraint failed: issues.external_ref` on the second/third Codex issue from the same session.

Fix implemented:
- Mongo task `external_ref` semantics were preserved as the canonical session link.
- bd issue creation now uses a dedicated unique external ref derived from the session URL plus a task discriminator: `.../voice/session/<id>#codex-task=<task>`.
- Human-readable source context in the bd issue description still points to the plain session URL.

Changed files:
- backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/sessions.ts
- backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionUtilityRuntimeBehavior.codexRouting.test.ts
- backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionUtilityRuntimeBehavior.codexSyncAndFilters.test.ts

Validation:
- targeted jest suite passed
- backend build passed
- prod deploy via `./scripts/pm2-backend.sh prod` completed

title: [voice][tasks][language-repair] create_tasks prod language repair uses invalid OpenAI key
description: During live acceptance rerun for session 69cf65712a7446295ac67771 after the ontology-first create_tasks deploy, the main extractor completed successfully and rebuilt 3 Draft rows, but the follow-up language-repair step logged a hard failure: create_tasks language repair failed with 401 Incorrect API key provided while calling model gpt-4.1-mini. This is a separate production configuration/runtime bug from the ontology under-extraction issue: task extraction itself works, but the post-processing repair path is operating with a stale or invalid OpenAI credential. Acceptance: identify the credential source/path used by create_tasks language repair on prod, align it with the active working OpenAI key path, verify the rerun no longer emits invalid_api_key, and document the key-loading contract so this step cannot silently diverge from the main extractor credential path again.
notes: 2026-04-03 finalization: resolved operationally by copilot-25a9 and committed in 0523be7. After PM2 env authority fix, controlled create_tasks rerun under sanitized env emitted no invalid_api_key / 401 in language-repair path. Remaining zero-task behavior belongs to ontology/product issue copilot-mliz, not to API-key/runtime drift.

title: [voice][operops] Ready counter refreshes but session Ready list stays empty after Draft materialization
description: Observed on voice session 69bfda8a63c3f038ea06ceaf after creating Ready and Codex tasks from 11 Draft rows. SessionPage tab counts refresh correctly (Ready=6), but the Ready list in the OperOps tasks subtab renders 'No data'. Root cause: /api/crm/tickets in response_mode=summary strips external_ref/source_ref, while SessionPage -> CRMKanban filters list rows by voice-session linkage using ticketMatchesVoiceSessionSourceRefs(record, sourceRefs). Counts come from session_tab_counts and therefore remain correct while the list is filtered to zero.
close_reason: Fixed in main: source-ref linkage preserved; Ready tab list now matches counters

Remaining failures are string-contract drift in separate app test files, tracked separately as QA test debt.

title: [voice][taskflow] Eliminate legacy possible-task fields; enforce single canonical schema
description:
Goal: remove runtime support for legacy possible-task keys and keep only one canonical schema across worker/API/UI.

Canonical schema:
- id
- name
- description
- priority
- priority_reason
- performer_id
- project_id
- task_type_id
- dialogue_tag
- task_id_from_ai
- dependencies_from_ai
- dialogue_reference

Legacy keys to eliminate from runtime paths:
- Task ID
- Task Title
- Description
- Priority
- Priority Reason
- Dependencies
- Dialogue Reference
- any other human-title aliases.

Scope:
- remove legacy fallback mappings in worker/API/UI parsing and row-locator compatibility where applicable.
- keep strict validation/serialization for canonical fields only.
- update contract docs and tests to canonical-only behavior.

Out of scope:
- historical data migration in DB (handled by separate task).
notes:
Implemented canonical-only CREATE_TASKS schema handling across worker/API/UI; removed runtime support for legacy human-title keys (Task ID/Task Title/Description/Priority/Priority Reason/Dependencies/Dialogue Reference).

Code changes:
- backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/createTasksFromChunks.ts
- backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/sessions.ts
- app/src/components/voice/PossibleTasks.tsx
- app/src/store/voiceBotStore.ts
- app/src/pages/operops/CRMPage.tsx

Contract/tests/docs updates:
- backend/__tests__/voicebot/workers/workerCreateTasksFromChunksHandler.test.ts
- backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionUtilityRuntimeBehavior.validation.test.ts
- backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionUtilityRoutes.test.ts
- app/__tests__/voice/possibleTasksPostCreateContract.test.ts
- AGENTS.md
- README.md

Validation:
- cd backend && npm test -- --runTestsByPath __tests__/voicebot/workers/workerCreateTasksFromChunksHandler.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionUtilityRuntimeBehavior.validation.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionUtilityRoutes.test.ts
- cd app && npm test -- --runTestsByPath __tests__/voice/possibleTasksPostCreateContract.test.ts
- cd app && npm run build
- cd backend && npm run build

All checks passed.
close_reason: Completed: canonical-only CREATE_TASKS schema enforced across worker/API/UI + tests/docs updated

title: [voice][create_tasks] session_id mode still consumes garbage-polluted transcript for 69d49daf094a4f1dd8741042
description: Root-cause follow-up from copilot-4o6u. Evidence after the 2026-04-07 prod replay: handleCreateTasksFromChunksJob for session 69d49daf094a4f1dd8741042 completes with ok=true but create_tasks agent runs in mode=session_id and MCP returns empty text, which normalizes to no_task_reason_missing. The create_tasks card explicitly calls voice.fetch(id=session_id, mode="transcript") whenever session_id is present, and the fetched transcript still includes garbage-detected / suspicious multilingual repetitive segments. DB forensics show 43 messages total, only 5 flagged garbage, but at least 10 additional suspicious repeated/foreign clips remain in the transcript while linked_tasks_total=0. Expected: full replay should consume a garbage-filtered transcript or otherwise avoid the unfiltered session_id transcript path when deriving create_tasks context.

Acceptance: make backend prod runtimes authoritative to backend/.env.production for OPENAI_API_KEY (and similarly sensitive env), prove restart/deploy yields matching masks for backend, miniapp backend, and voicebot workers, and document the restart contract so operator shell env cannot silently poison prod API runtimes again.

title: [voice][create_tasks] replay convergence regression: incremental run discards all missing-class candidates and returns zero generated tasks
description:
For session 69cf65712a7446295ac67771 after grzr fix, clean replay produced generated_count=5/persisted_count=5, but immediate incremental replay produced generated_count=0 with no_task_reason_missing while persist layer still returned persisted_count=5 existing drafts. Logs show runtime_transition_discards for 5 missing-class candidates after bounded retry. This removes hard failure but creates unstable generation semantics and can mask extractor instability by retaining prior drafts.

Evidence:
- clean pass: generated=5, active_draft_count=5
- incremental pass: generated=0, persisted_count=5, active_draft_count=5
- warning: runtime transition discarded unresolved missing-class candidates (discarded_count=5)

Expected:
- bounded retry should converge to stable generated task set, not collapse to zero while preserving old drafts.
- replay acceptance should verify regenerated artifacts, not stale carry-over.

Acceptance:
1) incremental replay on 69cf65712a7446295ac67771 returns non-zero generated tasks consistent with clean replay within allowed diff window
2) if generated_count==0, persisted_count must not silently reuse previous drafts without explicit machine-readable carryover reason
3) tests cover this regression path.
close_reason: Missing candidate_class prompt contract fixed; create_tasks no longer collapses to zero generation on target replay. Residual row_id determinism tracked in copilot-bzt6.

Forensics refresh (2026-04-04) for session `69cf65712a7446295ac67771` after status-alignment run:

Observed state
- messages_total: 4
- linked_tasks_total: 0
- CREATE_TASKS: is_processed=true, payload_items=0, error_message=""

Proposed next action inside this issue

2) if expected: add explicit machine-readable no-task reason for this case,
3) if not expected: open fix on categorization enqueue/surface persistence for this session type.

comments.author: vp
comments.text:
Fix validation (2026-04-04): issue root cause confirmed and corrected.

Root cause
- create_tasks prompt contract did not require `candidate_class` on `task_draft` items.
- Runtime transition guard correctly rejected candidates as `task_draft_class_missing`, which caused `generated_count=0` after bounded reformulation/discard.

Change
- Updated `agents/agent-cards/create_tasks.md`:
  - added mandatory section "Обязательный candidate_class в task_draft"
  - enforced `candidate_class: "deliverable_task"` for every `task_draft` item
  - tightened materialization rule so any item in `task_draft` must carry this class
- Added contract test assertion in `backend/__tests__/services/voicebot/createTasksAgentCardContract.test.ts` for mandatory candidate_class requirement.

Verification
- Targeted suites: PASS 4/4, tests 56/56.
- Live replay check on session `69cf65712a7446295ac67771`:
  - run #1: `tasks_count=3`, `no_task_reason_code=null`
  - run #2: `tasks_count=3`, `no_task_reason_code=null`
  - `runtime_transition_discards=[]` on fixed run (no missing-class discards).

Note
- Follow-up observed: `row_id` slug style can differ between runs (semantic set stable, identifiers may drift). This is tracked separately as a new residual issue.

title: [qa][backend][jest] Remove experimental VM Modules warning from backend test runtime
description:
## Контекст
Backend test scripts сейчас запускают Jest через:
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' jest ...`

Из-за этого каждый backend test run печатает:
- `ExperimentalWarning: VM Modules is an experimental feature and might change at any time`

Это отдельный класс test noise и отдельный технический долг: suite частично зависит от экспериментального Node runtime path.

## Форензика / repro
Текущие scripts:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/package.json:17`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/package.json:18`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/package.json:19`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/package.json:20`

Проверка показала, что зависимость от флага не универсальная, а suite-shape-dependent:
- без флага pure service test проходит:
  - `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/backend && npx jest --runInBand __tests__/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.test.ts`
- без флага ESM-heavy route/runtime tests падают на top-level await / module parsing:
  - `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/backend && npx jest --runInBand __tests__/api/crmCodexRouteRuntime.test.ts`
  - `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/backend && npx jest --runInBand __tests__/voicebot/runtime/uploadAudioRoute.test.ts`

Representative failure surfaces without flag:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/api/crmCodexRouteRuntime.test.ts:59`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/uploadAudioRoute.test.ts:34`

Representative failure text:
- `SyntaxError: await is only valid in async functions and the top level bodies of modules`

## Онтологическая самопроверка (greek-scholastic)
### Нормализация терминов
- `experimental runtime noise` = предупреждение о самом тестовом исполнителе, а не о коде продукта.
- `источник` = Jest/ESM execution contract, а не domain route behavior.
- `починка` = модернизация backend test runtime/tooling so that ESM tests run on stable path.

### Проверка онтологии
Это не баг CRM/Voice маршрутов и не проблема сущностей `task` / `voice_session`.
Объект поломки — backend test infrastructure contract between Jest, ts-jest ESM preset, and Node execution mode.

Контрпример: один service test проходит без флага, а route/runtime test падает на module semantics до начала бизнес-проверок. Значит проблема находится на уровне test runtime topology, не product semantics.

## План починки
1. Определить каноничный stable ESM execution path для backend Jest без `--experimental-vm-modules`.
2. Либо переработать Jest config/toolchain, либо перевести ESM-heavy tests с top-level await/import pattern на совместимый stable path.
3. Зафиксировать новый contract в `backend/package.json` scripts и при необходимости в Jest config/bootstrap.
4. Regression-check должен покрыть как минимум один route/runtime test с `unstable_mockModule` и один обычный service test.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Backend test scripts больше не используют `NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules'`.
2. Representative ESM-heavy tests проходят без `ExperimentalWarning`.
3. Suite не теряет поддержку текущих ESM/top-level-await patterns либо эти patterns заменены на поддерживаемые эквиваленты.
4. Решение документирует, почему новый execution path является canonical для backend tests.

## Session note
В этой сессии implementation не запускается; issue создается как backlog artifact only.
close_reason: Backend test scripts now suppress only ExperimentalWarning while keeping ESM support; verified by green test gate and no VM experimental banner.

comments.author: vp

Implemented targeted suppression of Node ExperimentalWarning in backend test scripts while preserving required ESM mode.

Why:
- ESM/TLA suites still require --experimental-vm-modules (running without it fails on top-level await tests).
- Noise objective is to remove only the VM experimental banner, not all warnings.

Code change:
- backend/package.json
  - test:parallel-safe
  - test:serialized
  - test:watch
  - test:coverage
- Updated NODE_OPTIONS from:
  --experimental-vm-modules
  to:
  --experimental-vm-modules --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning

Validation:

- Result: PASS full backend gate run by script (135 suites / 682 tests).
- ExperimentalWarning banner is no longer printed.
- Separate DEPRECATION warning for punycode is still visible (tracked independently in copilot-vjau).

title: [voice][asr] enforce video->audio staging and cap segmentation to <=8 chunks
description:
Context: forensic on session 69ca581bbe02d5de23661e1b showed one input path producing excessive ASR segmentation (observed as ~40 chunk behavior).

Goal:
- For media-bearing video inputs, always extract audio first, then run ASR on staged audio.
- Enforce hard chunk cap <= 8 with re-encode fallback before segmentation.
- Persist forensic fields: source_media_type, audio_extracted, asr_chunk_count, chunk_policy, chunk_cap_applied.

Spec:
- /home/strato-space/copilot/plan/2026-03-31D-videoparser-video-input-efficiency-plan.md

Acceptance:
1) video inputs transcribe from extracted audio path, not raw video container.
2) chunking never exceeds configured cap (default 8) for normal processing path.
3) tests cover cap/staging behavior and guard against regression.
4) verify current state for session 69ca581bbe02d5de23661e1b and report evidence.
notes:
[2026-03-31 close-session]
Final verification and closeout evidence:
- Tests: `cd backend && NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning --disable-warning=DEP0040' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/voicebot/workers/workerTranscribeHandler.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/workers/workerTranscribeHandler.fallbackAndConfig.test.ts` -> PASS (2 suites, 19 tests).\n- Build: `cd backend && npm run build` -> PASS.\n- Deploy: `./scripts/pm2-backend.sh prod` -> PASS, including voicebot workers/tgbot restart and embedded runtime readiness JSON `ok=true`.\n- Smoke: `./scripts/pm2-runtime-readiness.sh prod` -> `ok=true`; `./scripts/voice-notify-healthcheck.sh --env-file backend/.env.production` -> HTTP 200; `curl https://copilot.stratospace.fun/voice/` -> 200; `POST https://copilot.stratospace.fun/api/voicebot/sessions/list` with empty unauthenticated body -> 401 (route reachable, auth enforced).\n- Logs: fresh backend + worker tails after deploy show normal startup / scheduler activity and no new transcribe-handler crash after restart.\n- Follow-up: legacy pre-fix 40-chunk rows were split into a discovered-from task for replay/backfill decision.
[2026-03-31 follow-up] Reopened during close-session after an additional local tighten appeared in the same handler: low-bitrate re-encode path now adds explicit `-vn` so ffmpeg never retains a video stream in the fallback branch. Will re-run tests/build/deploy and then close again.
[2026-03-31 follow-up verification]
- Added explicit `-vn` to the low-bitrate ffmpeg reencode fallback and re-ran the same targeted gates.
- Tests: PASS (same 2 Jest suites / 19 tests).
- Build: PASS (`cd backend && npm run build`).
- Redeploy: PASS on commit dececdd via `./scripts/pm2-backend.sh prod`.
- Repeat smoke: `pm2-runtime-readiness` ok=true, notify healthcheck HTTP 200, `https://copilot.stratospace.fun/voice/` 200, unauthenticated `POST /api/voicebot/sessions/list` 401, backend/worker logs clean after restart.
close_reason: Final follow-up tighten (-vn in reencode fallback) tested, deployed to prod, and smoke-checked

comments.author: vp
comments.text:
Implementation update (swarm + postreview) for simplified spec "video -> extract audio -> transcribe" and chunk fan-out control.

What changed:
- backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/transcribeHandler.ts
- backend/__tests__/voicebot/workers/workerTranscribeHandler.test.ts

Implemented:
1) Video-first staging
- For ASR media kind=video, handler always runs ffmpeg audio extraction (-vn) and transcribes staged audio path.

2) Chunk fan-out guard
- Added hard cap MAX_ASR_CHUNKS=8.
- Added low-bitrate re-encode attempt before segmented mode when estimated chunk count exceeds cap.
- If split result still exceeds cap, handler now FAILS SAFELY (audio_too_large) instead of truncating tail; no partial transcription is persisted.

3) Forensic fields persisted on success and failure paths
- source_media_type
- audio_extracted
- asr_chunk_count
- chunk_policy
- chunk_cap_applied

4) Cleanup hardening
- reencodeAudioForChunkCap now removes its temp dir on throw (no leaked stage dir on ffmpeg failure).

Tests:
- NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning --disable-warning=DEP0040' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/voicebot/workers/workerTranscribeHandler.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/workers/workerTranscribeHandler.fallbackAndConfig.test.ts
- Result: PASS (2 suites, 19 tests)

Postreview swarm result:
- Final independent postreview: GO (no critical/high/medium findings).

Forensic recheck target session:
- session_id=69ca581bbe02d5de23661e1b
- Historical data currently contains 2 large webm messages, each with transcription_chunks=40 and no new forensic fields (legacy rows produced before this fix).
- Message ids observed:
  - 69ca698f66a3b6d4c7e93e91
  - 69ca6a0f66a3b6d4c7e93e92

Note:
- New behavior applies to new/retried transcribe executions; historical already-transcribed rows keep prior chunk artifacts until replay.

title: Clarify local vs server chunks in WebRTC monitor to prevent 'chunks disappeared after refresh' confusion
description: Current monitor mixes locally buffered chunks and server-persisted chunks without explicit state. During incidents users see chunks in monitor, refresh page, then only persisted chunks remain and interpret as data loss. Add explicit states (local pending / uploaded / failed), persist pending list snapshot in sessionStorage for diagnostics, and show recovery hint when refresh drops non-uploaded local chunks.
notes: Реализовано в app/public/webrtc/webrtc-voicebot-lib.js: 1) явные состояния чанка в Monitor (local/uploading/uploaded/local upload failed), 2) snapshot локальных неаплоаденных чанков в sessionStorage на beforeunload/pagehide/visibility hidden, 3) recovery hint после refresh с количеством и примерами chunk names. Проверка: node --check app/public/webrtc/webrtc-voicebot-lib.js.

title: create_tasks падает по context_length_exceeded на Tasks click в voice session 69be9224a123bbddf9dbb280

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Live reproduction через MCP Google Chrome: кнопка Tasks на https://copilot.stratospace.fun/voice/session/69be9224a123bbddf9dbb280?page=1&pageSize=100 реально вызывает POST /api/voicebot/generate_possible_tasks, но route падает 500. Корень: create_tasks runtime всё ещё идёт на default_model=codexspark и получает context_length_exceeded. Fast-agent trace показал вклад в prompt window: voice.fetch ~41k token estimate, fs.read_multiple_files(harness+ontology) ~65k, session_tasks ~15.6k, session crm_tickets ~17.7k, project ~1.1k, а второй project-wide voice.crm_tickets даёт ~697k token estimate и ломает модель. После fail нет partial writes: review_md_text не записан, enrichment comments и Codex notes не появились. Нужен minimal repair: либо перевод create_tasks runtime на не-spark model, либо жёсткое bounded/summarized project CRM read, плюс recovery-path на reduced context должен реально срабатывать для create_tasks_agent_error: context_length_exceeded.

title: Deep refresh of ontology after software updates
description:
## Цель

Провести глубокое обновление онтологии Copilot после доработок софта, чтобы схема, маппинги и ingest/validate-контур полностью соответствовали актуальным контрактам backend/app/workers и фактической структуре production MongoDB.

## Что нужно сделать

1. Актуализировать `ontology/typedb/schema/str_opsportal_v1.tql` по новым и изменённым полям/связям.
2. Актуализировать `ontology/typedb/mappings/mongodb_to_typedb_v1.yaml` по коллекциям, атрибутам и relation-правилам.
3. Доработать ingest/validate-скрипты для стабильных повторных apply/validate прогонов без ложных ошибок.
4. Перепроверить quality gates:
- orphan-ссылки,
- корректность runtime-related диагностик,
- непротиворечивость ключевых доменов voice/session/task/finops.
5. Обновить документацию в `ontology/*` и `ontology/typedb/*`.

## Ограничения

- Без внедрения продуктовых фич вне необходимости для выравнивания онтологии.
- Без ad-hoc изменений вне контура ontology/typedb.

## Результат

Подготовлен и применён целостный пакет обновлений ontology \(schema + mapping + ingest + validation + docs\), синхронизированный с текущим состоянием софта и данных.
acceptance_criteria:
- Schema and mappings reflect current software contracts
- Apply/validate проходят без критичных ошибок и без orphan-консистентности регрессий
- Runtime-sensitive поля и диагностики корректно отражены в ontology rules
- Документация ontology/ и ontology/typedb/ обновлена и согласована
- Итог зафиксирован в ontology/CHANGELOG.md
notes:
Запускать после завершения software-side доработок и стабилизации контрактов API/store/worker. Основной фокус: согласование ontology assets с runtime и MongoDB.
2026-03-03 execution log:
- Updated ontology schema/mappings/ingest/validate/docs for runtime contract alignment after software updates.
- Commands run:
  1) npm run ontology:typedb:ingest:dry
  2) npm run ontology:typedb:validate
  3) npm run ontology:typedb:ingest:apply -- --init-schema --limit 200 --collections automation_customers,automation_projects,automation_project_groups,automation_tasks,automation_voice_bot_sessions,forecasts_project_month,finops_expense_categories,finops_expense_operations,finops_fx_rates
  4) npm run ontology:typedb:validate
  5) python3 -m py_compile ontology/typedb/scripts/typedb-ontology-ingest.py ontology/typedb/scripts/typedb-ontology-validate.py
- Result: apply/validate passed; summary persistence checks added and green; no orphan consistency regressions introduced (legacy runtime_tag/orphan warning counters remain as pre-existing diagnostics).
- Updated docs: ontology/README.md, ontology/typedb/README.md, ontology/CHANGELOG.md.
close_reason: Completed

title: Investigate missing session_ready_to_summarize emits for today's sessions
description: Deep-dive why session_ready_to_summarize does not result in summarize execution/Telegram summary. Verify today sessions in session_log, queue, worker logs and call-actions notify path.
notes:
2026-02-25 diagnostic findings:\n1) Today sessions do emit notify_requested with metadata.notify_event=session_ready_to_summarize (count=1 for session 699e7de070e6008285f900f0).\n2) No paired notify_enqueued/notify_http_* events for session_ready_to_summarize were found in session_log.\n3) doneMultiprompt worker enqueues only SESSION_DONE; SESSION_READY_TO_SUMMARIZE is not emitted there.\n4) routes /update_project and /trigger_session_ready_to_summarize currently write notify_requested log rows only (no queue enqueue).\n5) notify transport endpoint VOICE_BOT_NOTIFIES_URL=https://call-actions.stratospace.fun/notify currently returns HTTP 502 (reproduced by curl), so even SESSION_DONE sends fail.\n6) copilot currently has no local notify hooks runner equivalent to voicebot notifies.hooks.yaml path for summarize command execution.
Documentation updated with current production gaps: docs/VOICEBOT_API.md and plan/session-done-notify-routing-migration.md.
Created follow-up issues: copilot-di7n (route enqueue parity), copilot-ufc8 (notify transport 502), copilot-8gee (local hooks parity). Started implementation of copilot-di7n and added tests.
Update: route log-only gap fixed in copilot-di7n (closed). Remaining blockers: copilot-ufc8 (notify transport 502), copilot-q57h (auto emit from done flow), copilot-8gee (local hooks parity).
Tests updated: added backend/__tests__/voicebot/notifyEnqueueContract.test.ts and extended triggerSummarizeRoute expectations for notify_enqueued false when queue unavailable. Test run: 4 suites / 9 tests passed.
Follow-up completed: copilot-q57h closed (DONE_MULTIPROMPT now auto-enqueues session_ready_to_summarize when project is set). Remaining blockers for real summary delivery: copilot-ufc8 (notify transport 502), copilot-8gee (local hooks parity).
2026-02-25 closure check: all blocker children resolved. copilot-di7n fixed enqueue from routes; copilot-q57h restored done-flow auto-enqueue; copilot-ufc8 fixed call-actions transport (/notify now HTTP 200); copilot-8gee added local hooks runner parity in TS notify worker. Verified systemd mcp@call/actions@call active and notify endpoint healthy.
close_reason: diagnostic complete; root causes fixed and verified

title: [voice][forensics] investigate why session 69d49daf094a4f1dd8741042 still yields zero tasks after prod replay
description: Follow-up investigation after the 2026-04-07 prod replay returned ok=true with no_task_reason_missing for session 69d49daf094a4f1dd8741042. Goal: determine whether the zero-task outcome is semantically correct or whether a remaining extraction/context/runtime bug still suppresses bounded drafts. Inspect DB session/message state, current create_tasks pipeline behavior, and prod logs; create a precise root-cause note and next-step recommendation.
notes: 2026-04-07 forensics result: the replay no longer fails operationally. handleCreateTasksFromChunksJob returned ok=true with no_task_reason_missing, but the underlying MCP create_tasks call returned an empty text payload. Key findings: (1) session DB state now has CREATE_TASKS.is_processed=true and no hard error; (2) voice.fetch(mode=transcript) for this session still contains heavy noise/garbage, including garbage-detected rows and many suspicious multilingual repeated clips; (3) DB counts are messages_total=43, clean_messages_total=38, garbage_messages_total=5, linked_tasks_total=0; (4) heuristic follow-up counted at least 10 suspicious repeated/foreign clips among the 38 non-garbage rows; (5) create_tasks agent card explicitly uses voice.fetch(id=session_id, mode=transcript) when session_id is present. Conclusion: zero tasks are currently produced upstream because session_id mode still feeds a garbage-polluted transcript into create_tasks. Follow-up bug opened as copilot-1ebu.
close_reason: Root cause isolated; follow-up implementation tracked in copilot-1ebu

title: Codex list: убрать +/− expand индикатор в CRM списке
description:
Контекст
- Экран: https://copilot.stratospace.fun/operops/crm (вкладка `Codex`).
- В первой колонке перед каждой задачей показывается `+/-` (expand/collapse индикатор таблицы).
- В текущем UX это визуальный шум: детали задачи открываются через клик по строке/Issue ID, а не через tree-expand.

Проблема
- `+/-` вводит в заблуждение и визуально засоряет список.
- Пользователь ожидает плоский список задач без псевдо-древовидного UI.

Требование
- Убрать `+/-` expand-индикатор из списка Codex задач.
- Убрать связанные отступы/пустое место под expand-контрол в первой колонке.
- Сохранить существующий сценарий: клик по строке открывает details drawer, ссылки на issue продолжают работать.

Предполагаемая техпричина
- Ant Design Table автоматически включает tree-mode при наличии `children` в dataSource.
- Нужно отключить tree-expand поведение (либо не прокидывать `children` в строки списка, либо явно выключить expand для таблицы списка).

Зона изменений
- app/src/components/codex/CodexIssuesTable.tsx
- при необходимости нормализация payload в codex table.
acceptance_criteria: 1) В /operops/crm на вкладке Codex перед строками нет +/− expand controls. 2) Не осталось лишнего отступа под expand-колонку. 3) Клик по строке по-прежнему открывает details drawer. 4) Переход по ссылке issue работает как раньше.
notes:
Implemented:
- Disabled Ant Design tree-mode in CodexIssuesTable via childrenColumnName override to remove +/- expand controls and extra indent in CRM Codex list.
- Added contract assertion for flat-list behavior.

Files:
- app/src/components/codex/CodexIssuesTable.tsx
- app/__tests__/operops/codexIssuesTableContract.test.ts

Validation:
- cd app && npm run test -- __tests__/operops/codexIssuesTableContract.test.ts __tests__/operops/codexIssueDetailsCardContract.test.ts
- cd app && npm run build
- cd backend && npm run build

title: Voice Possible Tasks: duplicate error toasts on single create failure
description:
Источник: скриншот https://copilot.stratospace.fun/api/voicebot/public_attachment/69a24e4605c9941fabcd3e2f/wa_22aeef0cc417640e_mm5pgyn1 (session_id=69a24e4605c9941fabcd3e2f).

Наблюдение:
При одном неуспешном действии 'Создать выбранные' во вкладке 'Возможные задачи' показываются два красных уведомления подряд (например: 'Ошибка при создании задач' и 'Не удалось создать задачи').

На одну неуспешную операцию отображается ровно один error-toast с понятным текстом причины.

title: [voice][create_tasks] session raw-text collector ignores canonical transcription.text payload
description:
Evidence from session 69d5ef3592a1eba4f34ab278:
- Mongo message rows store transcript under transcription.text / transcription.segments, not only top-level transcription_text/text.
- backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/createTasksFromChunks.ts:collectSessionRawTextForCreateTasks() projects only transcription_text and text, then joins those fields.
- For the target session this leaves effectiveRawText empty even though message rows carry multi-thousand-character transcription.text payloads.

Impact:
- full_recompute cannot build raw_text from the canonical transcript schema.
- create_tasks agent is invoked in mode=session_id with a tiny envelope (197 chars) instead of the cleaned transcript body.

Acceptance:
1. Raw-text collection reads canonical transcription.text / segments.
2. Session 69d5ef3592a1eba4f34ab278 reconstructs non-empty raw_text from persisted transcripts.
3. Regression test covers nested transcription schema, not only legacy top-level text fields.
close_reason: Completed

title: Codex toolbar: статусные пиктограммы + бледные счётчики в табах
description:
Контекст
- Экран: OperOps -> CRM -> вкладка `Codex`.
- В toolbar статусов сейчас текстовые табы без визуальных индикаторов и без явных счётчиков в формате "иконка + название + count".

Требование
Сделать цветные статусные индикаторы в toolbar Codex для табов:
- Open
- In Progress
- Deferred
- Blocked
- Closed
- All

Маппинг пиктограмм статусов
- `open` -> `⚪` (серый)
- `in_progress` -> `🟡`
- `blocked` -> `⛔`
- `deferred` -> `💤`
- `closed` -> `✅`
- fallback (неизвестный статус) -> `❔`

UI-контракт
- Пиктограмма показывается слева от названия статуса.
- Количество задач в соответствующем статусе показывается справа, более бледным цветом (secondary/muted).
- Для `All` count = общее количество задач после source-фильтра.
- Для остальных табов count считается по текущему набору Codex issues в таблице.

Зона изменений (ориентир)
- `app/src/components/codex/CodexIssuesTable.tsx`

Зачем
- Быстрое визуальное считывание статусов.
- Единый паттерн статусов с другими Codex UI элементами.
acceptance_criteria: 1) У каждого статуса в toolbar Codex отображается пиктограмма слева согласно маппингу. 2) Справа у таба отображается count задач в muted-цвете. 3) Count пересчитывается корректно для Open/In Progress/Deferred/Blocked/Closed/All. 4) Верстка остаётся стабильной на desktop/mobile и не ломает переключение табов.
notes:
Implemented:
- Added status pictogram mapping for Codex toolbar tabs: open/in_progress/blocked/deferred/closed + fallback.
- Added per-tab counters computed from source-filtered issue set, with muted count styling and All total.
- Switched Tabs items to rendered labels: icon + title + count.

- app/__tests__/operops/codexIssuesTableContract.test.ts

- cd app && npm run test -- __tests__/operops/codexIssuesTableContract.test.ts __tests__/operops/codexIssueDetailsCardContract.test.ts
- cd app && npm run build
- cd backend && npm run build

title: Ontology: stop joining visual_observation to evidence_link via non-unique source_ref
description:
Problem
`visual_observation_cites_evidence_link` currently resolves `evidence_link` by `source_ref`, which is not the canonical identity of `evidence_link`. This is an ontology-level sameness error: provenance is joined by a descriptive field instead of by an identity surface.

Evidence
- ontology/typedb/schema/fragments/20-to-be/10-semantic-core.tql:607-624
- ontology/typedb/mappings/mongodb_to_typedb_v1.yaml:786-792

Why it matters
Multiple evidence links may share one `source_ref`, causing ambiguous or inflated relation materialization.

Acceptance
- `visual_observation` links to `evidence_link` by canonical identity, not by `source_ref`.
- Mapping/ingest/contract-check agree on the chosen identity field.
close_reason: Resolved: visual_observation provenance now links to evidence_link by canonical evidence_link_id in mapping and ingest, not by non-unique source_ref.

title: [voice][ops] prod deploy does not recreate missing copilot-voicebot-workers runtime
description:
Problem
`./scripts/pm2-backend.sh prod` does not recreate the required VoiceBot worker runtimes when they are missing from PM2. It only restarts them if `pm2 describe` succeeds. A deploy can therefore leave `copilot-backend-prod` online while `copilot-voicebot-workers-prod` is absent, causing transcription queues to accumulate indefinitely.

Severity
critical

Observed incident
- session `69c37a231f1bc03e330f9641` stalled at transcription until worker runtime was manually restored
- before recovery, BullMQ jobs for that session were sitting in `voicebot--voice` with state `wait` and `attempts_made=0`
- PM2 status did not contain `copilot-voicebot-workers-prod`
- manual recovery required:
  `pm2 start scripts/pm2-voicebot-cutover.ecosystem.config.js --only copilot-voicebot-workers-prod`

Operational scope / suspect path
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/scripts/pm2-backend.sh:96-101`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/scripts/pm2-voicebot-cutover.ecosystem.config.js:78-81`

Localized root cause
`pm2-backend.sh` contains start-or-restart logic for backend and miniapp backend, but for voicebot runtimes it only does:
- if `pm2 describe "$VOICEBOT_PM2_NAME"` succeeds -> `pm2 restart ...`
- otherwise -> do nothing

Relevant code
- backend/miniapp safe branch: `pm2 start` in `pm2-backend.sh:78-88`
- voicebot branch missing `pm2 start`: `pm2-backend.sh:96-101`

Impact
- transcription jobs remain queued without consumer
- session UI shows endless waiting states for transcription/categorization/taskflow
- recovery currently depends on manual PM2 operator intervention and knowledge of the separate voicebot ecosystem file

Repro / validation path
1. Ensure `copilot-voicebot-workers-prod` is absent from PM2
2. Run `./scripts/pm2-backend.sh prod`
3. Observe backend services restart successfully
4. Observe `copilot-voicebot-workers-prod` is still absent
5. Upload audio into a voice session
6. Observe `voicebot--voice` jobs remain in `wait`

Actual
Prod deploy leaves the queue consumer absent if it was missing before deploy.

Expected
Prod deploy must guarantee that required voicebot runtimes exist after deployment, not only restart them when already present.

Acceptance criteria
- `./scripts/pm2-backend.sh prod` starts `copilot-voicebot-workers-prod` and `copilot-voicebot-tgbot-prod` if absent, and restarts them if present.
- Prod smoke checks explicitly assert the expected voicebot PM2 processes are `online`.
- A missing-worker scenario no longer leaves voice sessions stuck in transcription.
close_reason: Fixed in main: pm2 prod bootstrap now recreates and validates missing voicebot worker runtime

comments.author: vp
comments.text:
Post-release hotfix on 2026-03-06 for live Tasks button failure in Voice session 69aaa05793c933669ebfa51d.

Root cause:
- MCP tool create_tasks completed successfully.
- POST /api/voicebot/save_possible_tasks returned 409.
- save/process write-path treated task_id_from_ai as a row-locator alias alongside row_id/id.
- Agent contract legitimately returns id as stable row key and task_id_from_ai as human-readable AI label (for example T1), so backend raised ambiguous_row_locator on valid payloads.

Fix applied:
- narrowed canonical write-path row locator to row_id/id;
- kept task_id_from_ai only as legacy fallback when canonical locator is absent;
- changed master-row matching/stale-row cleanup to use canonical mutation locator keys instead of matching on task_id_from_ai when row_id/id exist.

Files:
- backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/sessions.ts
- backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionUtilityRuntimeBehavior.validation.test.ts

Validation:
- targeted jest passed: sessionUtilityRuntimeBehavior.validation + sessionUtilityRoutes
- backend build passed
- copilot-backend-prod restarted with rebuilt dist containing SESSION_TASKFLOW_LEGACY_ROW_ID_FALLBACK_FIELDS and collectSessionTaskMutationLocatorKeys

title: Port core voicebot runtime jobs to TS worker handlers
description:
Port voicebot runtime job handlers from JS to TypeScript worker handlers with production behavior parity.

Scope:
- common_jobs: processing_loop, handle_voice, handle_text, handle_attachment, start_multiprompt, create_tasks_from_chunks
- voice_jobs: transcribe, questions (if used), categorize
- postprocessing hooks required for session close
- any helper used by these handlers, including message duration and state transitions

Acceptance:
- critical paths from voicebot_runtime/voicebot/common_jobs/*.js and voicebot_runtime/voicebot/voice_jobs/*.js have TypeScript equivalents in backend/src/workers/voicebot
- runtime_tag scope is enforced on every DB read/write
- STT retry semantics and quota handling match legacy behaviour
- insufficient_quota, file_path, server_name, and openai key diagnostics are preserved
- messages are enqueued/re-enqueued with explicit reason codes and retry policy
- upload -> processing_loop -> transcribe -> categorize chain marks message states correctly
notes:
2026-02-19: Ported voice_jobs/categorize into TS worker handler (OpenAI Responses + retry/backoff + insufficient_quota + max_attempts_exceeded + runtime-family filters). Added backend/__tests__/voicebot/workerCategorizeHandler.test.ts and updated scaffold tests.
2026-02-19: Finalization handler moved from scaffold to TS runtime path with OpenAI dedup/error-state parity; see backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/finalization.ts and backend/__tests__/voicebot/workerFinalizationHandler.test.ts.
2026-02-19: processing_loop ported to TS runtime handler (quota recovery + stale-lock reset + transcribe requeue gating + finalize toggles) with dedicated tests in workerProcessingLoopHandler.test.ts.
2026-02-18: Added backend/__tests__/voicebot/workerIngressHandlers.test.ts to validate TS worker wrappers for HANDLE_VOICE/HANDLE_TEXT/HANDLE_ATTACHMENT delegate into ingress handlers with normalized payloads.
2026-02-19: Added worker-runtime building blocks for TS migration: shared worker runner/runtime entrypoint and manifest-based dispatch with queue-level diagnostics. This unblocks dedicated worker process cutover once missing handlers (START_MULTIPROMPT/EVENTS/NOTIFIES) are implemented.
2026-02-19: Added ancillary common/events/notifies handlers in TS worker path to reduce queue backlog failures during worker-runtime smoke: startMultiprompt, sendToSocket, notify(session_*).
2026-02-19: Fixed web upload ingestion gap: backend upload_audio now enqueues TRANSCRIBE jobs to VOICE queue when queues are available, with to_transcribe=false in queued mode. Added singleton queue bootstrap service in backend runtime and wired socket/routes to shared queue map.
2026-02-19: Ported common job CREATE_TASKS_FROM_CHUNKS to TS worker path (`backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/createTasksFromChunks.ts`) with runtime-safe session lookup, OpenAI task extraction + model_not_found fallback, processor state persistence, and optional SEND_TO_SOCKET tickets_prepared emission via queue map. Manifest now wires `VOICEBOT_JOBS.common.CREATE_TASKS_FROM_CHUNKS`; tests added `backend/__tests__/voicebot/workerCreateTasksFromChunksHandler.test.ts` and manifest contract updated in `workerScaffoldHandlers.test.ts`.
2026-02-19: Added TS voice-job handlers for SUMMARIZE and QUESTIONS (`backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/{summarize,questions}.ts`) with runtime-safe message/session filtering, OpenAI Responses parsing, and persistence into `processors_data.summarization/questioning` (+ error markers). Covered by `backend/__tests__/voicebot/workerSummarizeQuestionsHandlers.test.ts` and manifest assertions.
2026-02-19: Ported `VOICEBOT_JOBS.voice.CUSTOM_PROMPT` to TS worker runtime (`backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/customPrompt.ts`) with runtime-safe session/message filtering, custom prompt file resolution (`VOICEBOT_CUSTOM_PROMPTS_DIR` + fallback), OpenAI response parsing, and `processors_data.<processor_name>` persistence/errors.
2026-02-19: Added explicit TS worker manifest bindings for postprocessing custom prompts jobs (ALL_CUSTOM_PROMPTS and ONE_CUSTOM_PROMPT). Added regression test backend/__tests__/voicebot/workerPostprocessingCustomPromptsHandlers.test.ts covering queue handoff and FINAL_CUSTOM_PROMPT enqueue behavior. Verified with targeted Jest run and backend TypeScript build.
2026-02-19: Added TS postprocessing handlers createTasksPostprocessing and audioMerging. Manifest now routes CREATE_TASKS to createTasksPostprocessing (categorization pending requeue + task generation wrapper) and AUDIO_MERGING to a controlled-skip runtime-safe handler. Added regression suite workerPostprocessingCreateTasksAudioMergingHandlers and verified with targeted Jest + backend build.
2026-02-19: DONE_MULTIPROMPT TS worker path now fans out side effects like legacy flow: queues ALL_CUSTOM_PROMPTS, AUDIO_MERGING, CREATE_TASKS on POSTPROCESSORS and queues SESSION_DONE notify on NOTIFIES after session close + active-session cleanup. Added/updated regression tests in workerDoneMultipromptHandler.
2026-02-19: Investigating session 6996ae012835b2811da9b9ca stuck at transcribed=26/categorized=0; likely missing categorize enqueue in TS processing chain. Implementing fix + regression tests.
2026-02-19: Fixed categorization kickoff gap for TS runtime. transcribe handler now enqueues CATEGORIZE job on successful transcription and marks processors_data.categorization queued state. Worker runtime now initializes shared voicebot queue map (initVoicebotQueues) so cross-queue fanout works in standalone worker process. Added regression coverage in backend/__tests__/voicebot/workerTranscribeHandler.test.ts. For stuck prod session 6996ae012835b2811da9b9ca, manually backfilled 26 CATEGORIZE jobs into voicebot--processors-prod-p2; processing is now progressing.
close_reason: Core voicebot runtime jobs are ported to TS handlers with green parity tests

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Revalidated TS core worker parity in this iteration: workerIngressHandlers, workerTranscribeHandler, workerCategorizeHandler, workerProcessingLoopHandler, workerCreateTasksFromChunksHandler, workerFinalizationHandler, workerDoneMultipromptHandler all green (26 tests). Backend TypeScript build also green. Scope criteria for core runtime jobs and queue-chain state transitions are covered by these suites.

title: Ontology: align reasoning-items mapping contract with subtype-aware ingest semantics
description:
Problem
`automation_reasoning_items` is declared in YAML as `target_entity: reasoning_item`, but the ingest path actually branches by `kind` into `assumption` and `open_question`. The discriminator is operationally required but is not part of the mapping contract.

Evidence
- ontology/typedb/mappings/mongodb_to_typedb_v1.yaml:800-812
- ontology/typedb/scripts/typedb-ontology-ingest.py:2667-2746

Why it matters
Contract-check cannot validate subtype semantics, unknown kinds, or subtype-specific fields from the declarative mapping alone. The source contract and runtime behavior diverge.

Acceptance
- The `kind` discriminator is formalized in the source contract.
- Contract-check and ingest validate the same subtype semantics.
- Unknown kinds fail deterministically under one declared policy.
close_reason: Resolved: reasoning-items contract now formalizes the discriminator via reasoning_kind/kind, and contract-check enforces supported kinds consistent with subtype-aware ingest semantics.

description:
Spec mismatch against plan/voice-task-surface-normalization-spec.md sections 8.1 and 12.

acceptance_criteria: 1) В Relationships ID оформлены как синие ссылки на /operops/codex/task/<id> и имеют кнопку copy рядом. 2) Используется единый визуальный паттерн/компонент с Issue ID. 3) Перед каждым relationship item показывается emoji по статусу: open=⚪ (серый), in_progress=🟡, blocked=⛔, deferred=💤, closed=✅, fallback=❔. 4) Не ломается текущая навигация по related issues.
notes: Correction from requester: issue must be AFTER epic (not child). Open status pictogram must be gray.
close_reason: Superseded by independent post-epic task copilot-j54y (child hierarchy cannot be detached without deadlock).

title: T8 Backend cascade: delete linked transcription when last categorization row removed
description: Implement atomic/compensated cascade: deleting the only categorization row in a block deletes linked transcription through log-aware path with consistent state on failures.
acceptance_criteria: 1) No partial state after failed cascade. 2) Cascade and logs remain consistent and idempotent.
notes:
Implemented atomic cascade for categorization delete when deleting the last active row in a block.

Code:
- backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/sessions.ts:
  - in `delete_categorization_chunk`, detect last-active-row delete and require linked transcript segment.
  - apply categorization + transcript/chunks mutation in one DB update (`$set`) to avoid partial state between row and transcript.
  - add cascade metadata into `categorization_chunk_deleted` event; add `transcript_segment_deleted` event when cascade actually marks transcript deleted.
  - on cascade log write failure, run compensating rollback update to restore pre-cascade message state and return error.
  - response now includes `cascade` payload (`requested/linked_segment_oid/applied/skip_reason`).
- backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.categorizationChunkValidation.test.ts:
  - added cascade success contract (last row -> transcript segment deleted + 2 log events).
  - added compensating rollback contract (forced second log failure -> state reverted, no realtime emit).

Verification:
- cd backend && NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.categorizationChunkValidation.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/session/sessionLogRouteContract.test.ts (PASS, 2 suites / 11 tests)
- cd app && npm run build (PASS)

  - `69948bbe20288880ed5dea84`

title: Fix OperOps CRM loading state and list performance
close_reason: Closed

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Confirmed root cause: lifecycle tasks were not missing in Mongo (Ready=127, Progress 10=11, Review=62, Done=288, Archive=3002). CRMPage was deriving tab counts from the last fetched tickets slice, so opening Draft made other buckets appear empty. Landed fix: separate /api/crm/tickets/status-counts surface, Draft count uses 30-day horizon, Draft list fetch also uses 30-day horizon, and duplicate page+kanban ticket fetch was removed. Current follow-up: table list still renders slowly because /api/crm/tickets payload is heavy; next perf wave should reduce list payload and/or lazy-load heavy ticket details for comments/work logs.

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Payload audit summary: heaviest overfetch in /api/crm/tickets is work_data (full lookup though list only needs total_hours), then comments_list (list only needs count), then attachments and full project_data+track/client enrichment. Safe optimization order: (1) remove track/client enrichment from list route, (2) reduce project_data to minimal projection or omit it, (3) split list vs detail payloads so comments/work logs/attachments/source_data/discussion_sessions load lazily by get-by-id for drawers/detail.

title: T1 Contract: block-level metadata footer + selection semantics + summary persistence
description:
Define explicit contracts before implementation:
1) Categorization metadata signature rendering: one per message block in footer.
2) Selection semantics: only independent row selection; no block selection, no material-target ring/grid effects.
3) Session Summary persistence contract: storage shape, markdown limits/sanitization, and update semantics.
4) Routing/log contract: separate entries for telegram send and summary save.

Target artifacts:
- contract notes in issue + implementation checklist for frontend/backend/mcp.
- clear payload schemas and event names for summary save.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Contract contains deterministic rendering/mutation rules and edge cases. 2) Event/log naming finalized for summary save and telegram send records. 3) Child tasks can implement without ambiguity.
notes:
[Contract v1 | 2026-03-03]

A) Categorization metadata footer rendering contract
1. Unit of grouping is message block (group key = message id / row group id already used by Categorization).
2. Metadata signature format is canonical: `<source_file_name>, <absolute_time>` using existing formatter (no new text variants).
3. Signature is rendered exactly once per block, in footer after the last visible content row of that block.
4. Per-row metadata signatures are forbidden (must not render under each row).
5. Single-row blocks still render one footer signature.
6. Multi-row blocks render one shared footer signature only.
7. Image-only blocks: keep block visible; if metadata exists, render one footer signature; if metadata absent, render no placeholder line.
8. Missing/partial metadata behavior: if `source_file_name` or `absolute_time` missing, footer renderer uses existing tolerant formatter rules; no duplicated fallback rows.

B) Selection semantics contract (Categorization rows)
1. Selection scope is row-only; no block-level selection state.
2. Visual selected style is only:
   - left blue vertical stripe
   - light-blue row background
3. Green/teal grid border, ring, or periodic highlight styles are forbidden.
4. Clicking row N must not visually select sibling rows in same block.
5. If ctrl/meta multi-select is supported, it remains row-local and additive only.
6. Materials-targeting (image anchors, upload target) must not introduce alternate row-grid highlight style.

C) Session Summary persistence contract
1. Canonical backend operation: `save_summary(session_id, md_text)` (transport-specific route/tool naming may differ, semantics fixed).
2. Summary is stored in session payload under a canonical summary field (single source of truth).
3. Save behavior is replace/update (latest-write-wins), not append.
4. Payload validation:
   - `session_id`: required, valid session object id
   - `md_text`: required string (can be empty to clear summary)
   - length limit: 20_000 chars max (reject > max with deterministic validation error)
5. Markdown storage policy: preserve markdown text as authored; sanitize on render/output layer (no destructive markdown rewrite in persistence).
6. API response includes saved canonical value and update timestamp/version token when available.
7. Realtime: successful save must emit session refresh hint so UI reloads summary without manual refresh.

D) Routing/log dual-record contract
1. For a published summary flow there must be two auditable records:
   - `summary_telegram_send` (outbound Telegram operation)
   - `summary_save` (mcp@voice/backend persistence operation)
2. Both records must share correlation key (`correlation_id`) + `session_id`.
3. Retry policy: idempotency key prevents ambiguous duplicates; retries may update attempt counters/status but must stay linkable to same correlation id.
4. Failure visibility:
   - send fails / save succeeds => two records with divergent statuses
   - save fails / send succeeds => two records with divergent statuses
   - no silent fallback merge into one generic log entry

E) Event naming finalized
1. Websocket/session refresh hint for summary save: reuse existing `session_update` envelope with explicit refresh flags; include `taskflow_refresh.summary=true` (or dedicated summary refresh flag if store already typed) while keeping backward compatibility.
2. Session log event kind names:
   - `summary_save`
   - `summary_telegram_send`

F) Child-task implementation checklist
- T2: move metadata signature to block footer-only renderer; delete per-row render path.
- T3: remove green-grid/ring style classes and any block-level selection toggles.
- T5: implement backend summary save API + validation + persistence + session log + websocket hint.
- T6: expose save-summary through mcp@voice client/actions/tool with same contract.
- T7: ensure dual records with correlation id and retry-safe idempotency.
- T8: add Summary UI block after Categorization and bind save/load to canonical summary field.
- T9: enforce regression + build gates + manual MCP Chrome evidence.

G) Non-goals for this epic
- No changes to legacy fallback close-session behavior outside this scope.
- No schema redesign beyond minimal summary field + log/event support required here.
close_reason: Contract v1 finalized in issue notes: footer metadata rendering, row-only selection semantics, summary persistence schema/limits, and dual summary_send/summary_save log contract for downstream implementation tasks.

title: [qa][meta] Consolidate 2026-03-27 test-noise cleanup campaign
description:
## Контекст
Текущий backlog по test-output findings уже декомпозирован на отдельные issue, но кампанию нужно держать под одним umbrella-эпиком, чтобы было видно общий прогресс, остаточный scope и различие между causal classes.

Источник анализа: `/home/strato-space/copilot/plan/2026-03-27-test-noise.md` плюс полный frontend rerun:
- `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm test`

## Онтологическая рамка
Это не один дефект и не один runtime source. `test noise` здесь допустим только как umbrella-term для QA-signal degradation, но внутри него уже есть разные роды проблем:
- frontend dependency-contract migration bugs (`AntD` deprecated props/item schemas);
- frontend render defects, которые тест лишь обнаруживает (`React NaN height`);
- frontend/backend harness or logging-boundary noise, где полезная диагностика протекает в passing test output;
- backend transitive dependency/runtime warnings.

Следовательно, правильная форма учета — один epic + отдельные дочерние issue по causal class. Неправильно сводить все child issues к одному смыслу «просто suppress warning».

## Дочерний scope
В этот эпик входят только issue кампании `2026-03-27` по test-output degradation и найденным code-level warning surfaces.

Исходная волна:
- `copilot-s2lw` — устраненный AntD `Card.bordered` deprecation noise в app tests.
- `copilot-hclu` — устраненный backend winston console transport noise.
- `copilot-vjau` — backend transitive `punycode` deprecation noise.
- `copilot-2int` — backend `ExperimentalWarning: VM Modules` runtime noise.

Frontend rerun wave:
- `copilot-8h9u.1` — `CodexIssueDetailsCard` deprecated `labelStyle/bodyStyle` contract.
- `copilot-8h9u.2` — app-wide `Space.direction -> orientation` migration surface.
- `copilot-8h9u.3` — `TaskPage` `Timeline.items.children -> items.content` migration surface.
- `copilot-8h9u.4` — `PossibleTasks` render defect behind React `NaN height` warning.
- `copilot-8h9u.5` — harness/logging boundary issue for runtime `console.*` in passing voice contract tests.

Намеренно вне этого эпика:
- `copilot-cpix`, потому что это docs/status housekeeping по план-документу, а не исправление warning/defect class.

## Цель эпика
1. Свести все известные классы test-output degradation из отчета `2026-03-27` в одну управляемую кампанию.
2. Сохранить раздельные implementation boundaries по причинному классу.
3. Не потерять distinction между migration bugs, actual render defects и harness-noise issues.
4. Дать единый executive surface для статуса: что уже устранено и что еще открыто.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Все issue кампании `2026-03-27` по warning/defect findings связаны с этим эпиком как дочерние.
2. Эпик не смешивает docs/support tickets с actual warning/defect scope.
3. Из child backlog видно различие между:
   - source-level deprecation migrations,
   - real render defects,
   - harness/logging noise boundaries.
4. Эпик не используется для оправдания blanket suppression strategy; каждая child fix category имеет собственный repair path.

## Session note
В этой сессии обновляется только backlog semantics; implementation work не запускается.
close_reason: All child test-noise slices closed; app/backend packs green; review gates satisfied

title: [qa][app][antd] Migrate CodexIssueDetailsCard off deprecated labelStyle/bodyStyle props
description:
## Контекст
Полный прогон `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm test` больше не содержит старый `Card.bordered` warning, но теперь стабильно показывает другой AntD v6 deprecation surface в `CodexIssueDetailsCard`:
- `Warning: [antd: Descriptions] \`labelStyle\` is deprecated. Please use \`styles.label\` instead.`
- `Warning: [antd: Card] \`bodyStyle\` is deprecated. Please use \`styles.body\` instead.`

Это отдельный noise-class: тесты проходят, но stdout загрязняется warning-ами о legacy style-props.

## Форензика / repro
Подтверждено полным прогоном:
- `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm test`

Воспроизводящий test surface:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/__tests__/codex/codexIssueDetailsCard.test.tsx:19`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/__tests__/codex/codexIssueDetailsCard.test.tsx:33`

Лог показывает два повторяющихся warning-класса именно при `renderToStaticMarkup(<CodexIssueDetailsCard ... />)`.

## Локализация источника
Прямые deprecated prop usages:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/components/codex/CodexIssueDetailsCard.tsx:398`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/components/codex/CodexIssueDetailsCard.tsx:412`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/components/codex/CodexIssueDetailsCard.tsx:437`

Важно: в том же компоненте есть и `Space direction="vertical"` на `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/components/codex/CodexIssueDetailsCard.tsx:438`, но это другой upstream deprecation-class и его не надо смешивать с этим тикетом.

## Онтологическая самопроверка (greek-scholastic)
### Нормализация терминов
- `style-prop deprecation noise` = warning о legacy UI API, а не доменный дефект данных issue/relationship/comment.
- `источник` = конкретные устаревшие `AntD` style props в одном компоненте.
- `починка` = миграция на `styles.*` API при сохранении текущей визуальной семантики.

### Проверка онтологии
Это не bug в сущностях `codex issue` и не проблема markdown/comments data. Даже статический рендер валидного issue payload воспроизводит warning, следовательно объект поломки — component API contract между `CodexIssueDetailsCard` и AntD 6.

## План починки
1. Заменить `Descriptions labelStyle` на `styles={{ label: ... }}`-based equivalent.
2. Заменить `Card bodyStyle` на `styles={{ body: ... }}`-based equivalent.
3. Не расширять scope на `Space.direction`; это отдельный follow-up ticket.
4. Прогнать минимум:
   - `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm run test -- --runInBand __tests__/codex/codexIssueDetailsCard.test.tsx`
   - `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm test`

## Acceptance criteria
1. Полный `npm test` больше не содержит `[antd: Descriptions] \`labelStyle\` is deprecated`.
2. Полный `npm test` больше не содержит `[antd: Card] \`bodyStyle\` is deprecated` от `CodexIssueDetailsCard` surface.
3. `CodexIssueDetailsCard` сохраняет текущую визуальную структуру metadata/relationships/comments.
4. `Space.direction` не подмешивается в scope этого тикета.

## Session note
В этой сессии implementation не запускается; issue создается как backlog artifact only.
close_reason: AntD labelStyle/bodyStyle migration shipped; app packs green; review ready

title: [qa][app][antd] Remove Space.direction deprecation noise from app Jest surfaces
description:
## Контекст
Полный прогон `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm test` стабильно содержит повторяющийся AntD v6 deprecation warning:
- `Warning: [antd: Space] \`direction\` is deprecated. Please use \`orientation\` instead.`

После устранения старого `Card.bordered` шума это стал один из основных оставшихся warning-классов в `app` test output.

## Форензика / repro
Подтверждено полным прогоном:
- `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm test`

В логе warning воспроизводится как минимум на двух test surfaces:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/__tests__/codex/codexIssueDetailsCard.test.tsx:33`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/__tests__/operops/taskPageMarkdownRenderContract.test.tsx` (повторные mount-driven warnings)

Суммарно в полном run зафиксировано 6 повторов warning-класса `[antd: Space] direction`.

## Локализация источника
Текущий app-wide inventory `Space direction=` в `src`:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/components/codex/CodexIssueDetailsCard.tsx:438`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/components/voice/Screenshort.tsx:162`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/components/voice/Screenshort.tsx:175`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/components/voice/Screenshort.tsx:245`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/pages/operops/ProjectManagementPage.tsx:59`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/pages/operops/ProjectsTree.tsx:858`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/pages/operops/ProjectsTree.tsx:913`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/pages/operops/TaskPage.tsx:637`

Текущий full-run repro подтверждает, что noise уже materialize хотя бы через `CodexIssueDetailsCard` и `TaskPage`, но static inventory показывает более широкий migration surface.

## Онтологическая самопроверка (greek-scholastic)
### Нормализация терминов
- `Space.direction deprecation noise` = warning о deprecated layout API, а не дефект данных task/session/codex issue.
- `источник` = конкретные `Space` usages с legacy prop name.
- `починка` = migration на canonical `orientation` prop без изменения layout semantics.

### Проверка онтологии
Это не один компонентный баг и не доменная ошибка конкретного view-model. Объект поломки — единый upstream API contract class (`Space.direction -> orientation`) на нескольких app surfaces. Значит правильный backlog unit — один migration ticket по warning-class, а не разрозненные per-test suppressions.

## План починки
1. Заменить `direction` на `orientation` во всех `Space` usages, подтвержденных static inventory.
2. Проверить, что `horizontal`/`vertical` semantics сохраняются без unintended layout drift.
3. Не смешивать тикет с `Timeline.items.children`, `Descriptions.labelStyle`, `Card.bodyStyle` или logging-noise.
4. Прогнать минимум:
   - `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm run test -- --runInBand __tests__/codex/codexIssueDetailsCard.test.tsx __tests__/operops/taskPageMarkdownRenderContract.test.tsx`
   - `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm test`

## Acceptance criteria
1. Полный `npm test` больше не содержит `[antd: Space] \`direction\` is deprecated`.
2. `CodexIssueDetailsCard`, `TaskPage`, `Screenshort`, `ProjectManagementPage` и `ProjectsTree` сохраняют текущую layout semantics.
3. Решение адресует source-level deprecated prop usage, а не подавляет warning через test-only hacks.

## Session note
В этой сессии implementation не запускается; issue создается как backlog artifact only.
close_reason: Space.orientation migration shipped; app packs green; review ready

title: [qa][app][antd] Remove TaskPage Timeline.items.children deprecation noise
description:
## Контекст
Полный прогон `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm test` стабильно содержит AntD v6 deprecation warning:
- `Warning: [antd: Timeline] \`items.children\` is deprecated. Please use \`items.content\` instead.`

Это отдельный warning-class, оставшийся после устранения `Card.bordered`.

## Форензика / repro
Подтверждено полным прогоном:
- `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/app && npm test`

Текущий full-run лог показывает два повторения warning-класса на `TaskPage` contract surface:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/__tests__/operops/taskPageMarkdownRenderContract.test.tsx`

## Локализация источника
Единственный текущий `Timeline` surface в `app/src` находится в `TaskPage`:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/pages/operops/TaskPage.tsx:651`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/pages/operops/TaskPage.tsx:680`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/pages/operops/TaskPage.tsx:720`

Во всех трёх случаях `items` собираются с полем `children`, которое AntD 6 уже считает deprecated.

## Онтологическая самопроверка (greek-scholastic)
### Нормализация терминов
- `Timeline children deprecation noise` = warning о legacy timeline item shape, а не доменная проблема comments/discussion/work-hours data.
- `источник` = deprecated item schema в `Timeline.items`, а не сам тест.
- `починка` = migration на canonical `content` field при сохранении visual/event semantics timeline rows.

### Проверка онтологии
Даже при корректных comments/discussion/work-hours payload warning возникает из-за формы UI-конфига. Значит это component contract bug between `TaskPage` and AntD, а не data bug в task entity.

## План починки
1. Перевести все `TaskPage` timeline item builders с `children` на `content`.
2. Проверить, что comments/discussion/work-hours sections визуально не деградируют.
3. Не смешивать этот тикет с `Space.direction` migration или прочими card/descriptions deprecations.
