title: session_tasks(bucket='tasks') leaks DRAFT_10 rows on session-scoped path
description: Observed on session 69bb9e3de492c93c4a8c5fd6: voice.session_tasks(session_id, bucket='tasks') returned the same Draft rows as bucket='draft', even though tools/voice and the normalization specs define tasks bucket as accepted/non-draft session task view only. Need to fix backend/client session-scoped accepted filtering and align tests/docs.
close_reason: Closed

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Spec updated: voice-task-surface-normalization-spec.md now explicitly defines session_tasks(bucket='tasks') as the canonical accepted-only session task bucket, enumerates allowed accepted lifecycle keys (READY_10/PROGRESS_10/REVIEW_10/DONE_10/ARCHIVE), forbids DRAFT_10 in that bucket, and records the current leak as a contract violation rather than accepted behavior.

comments.author: vp
comments.text: User reported concrete reproduced case on session 69be49ea4ad7c397307d2d6f: Telegram summary block 'Задачи' still contains the same Draft rows shown in 'Draft-задачи'. Investigating backend accepted-bucket leakage and adding prompt-side defensive filtering in PM-04 so non-draft block cannot render DRAFT rows even under backend regression.

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Execution split started: backend worker fixes accepted-only bucket leakage in voicebot/session_tasks + session_tab_counts; prompt worker adds defensive exclusion of DRAFT rows from PM-04 'Задачи' block so Telegram summaries stay correct even under backend regression.

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Backend accepted-only guard deployed: session_tasks(bucket='tasks') now hard-excludes DRAFT_10 even when status_keys includes UNKNOWN or clients try to pass DRAFT_10. session_tab_counts computes accepted/task counts from non-draft rows only. Prompt-side PM-04 defensive guard also added in prompt repo so leaked DRAFT rows are omitted from Telegram block 'Задачи'.

title: [voice][migration] Remove runtime_tag from runtime behavior (code-only prep before weekend cutover)
description:
Контекст
- Принято решение: в выходные выполнить migration cutover на новый prod-сервер (MongoDB + Redis + backend).
- До cutover нужно подготовить кодовую базу к полному отказу от `runtime_tag`.
- В этом эпике меняем только код/контракты/тесты, БД не изменяем (никаких массовых update/unset в текущей базе).

Проверенные факты по текущей БД (stratodb)
- automation_voice_bot_sessions: total=1933, legacy(no runtime_tag)=1823, prod-family=105, gamma=5
- automation_voice_bot_messages: total=12036, legacy=10625, prod-family=1386, gamma=25
- automation_voice_bot_topics: total=1475, legacy=1475
- automation_tg_voice_sessions: total=12, prod-family=9, legacy=2, gamma=1

Текущее поведение backend
- В prod выдача сессий и сообщений использует `prod* + legacy(no tag)` фильтр.
- Фильтрация зашита в runtimeScope + db proxy + часть route/service/worker кода.
- На запись есть автодобавление `runtime_tag` в insert/upsert, плюс явные присвоения в ряде handlers/routes.
- Есть runtime-scoped ветки с `runtime_mismatch` (409), зависящие от runtime filter logic.

Целевой контракт (для следующей codex-сессии со swarm)
1) При выборке сессий/runtime-scoped данных `runtime_tag` полностью игнорируется.
2) В новые записи `runtime_tag` больше не пишется.
3) Из кода удаляется runtime-tag логика (фильтры, автоинъекции, служебные ветки), БД не трогаем.
4) После weekend migration изоляция окружений обеспечивается разными БД/инстансами, а не runtime_tag.

Ограничения
- Никаких изменений данных в Mongo/Redis в рамках этого эпика.
- Можно менять backend/app/tests/docs/env-contract.
- Требуется DAG и исполнение swarm-потоком в отдельной сессии.

Риски (осознанные)
- До cutover на отдельные БД, при полном игноре `runtime_tag`, видимость non-prod tagged данных в текущей общей БД возможна.
- Это допустимо как временная стадия подготовки к миграции.

План выполнения
- Декомпозиция в дочерние тикеты T0..T8.
- Критический путь: T0 -> T1 -> (T2,T3,T4,T5) -> (T6,T7) -> T8.
acceptance_criteria: 1) runtime_tag no longer affects backend read paths for voice/session/taskflow APIs. 2) runtime_tag no longer written by backend in new records. 3) DB untouched (no runtime_tag data migration). 4) test/build gates updated and green. 5) docs/env contract updated for post-tag architecture.
notes:
Epic wrap-up: all child tasks T0..T8 are closed and final QA gate is green.

Execution summary:
- T0 contract freeze/inventory completed (no DB mutation guardrail enforced).
- T1..T5 runtime-tag behavior neutralized across core/runtime/queues and write-paths in scope.
- T6 test refactor completed for runtime-tag-agnostic contract.
- T7 docs/env contract updated (runtime_tag deprecated as operational isolation mechanism).
- T8 final QA gate passed with full ./scripts/run-test-suite.sh voice and backend/app build gates green.

Cutover readiness:
- Code/test/docs state is ready for weekend handoff under code-only prep scope.
- No Mongo/Redis data migration commands were executed in this epic.
close_reason: Completed

title: [webrtc][qa] deterministic upload-audio E2E harness for Done→Start routing invariant
description:
## Context
Postreview for copilot-9w1n confirmed core race fix, but closure condition remains open: browser E2E does not assert upload-level invariant (no post-Start write to old session_id).

## Problem
Current Playwright surface validates session_done/create_session ordering and localStorage rebinding, but deterministic upload_audio generation in headless mode is non-deterministic with synthetic media setup.

## Goal
Add deterministic QA harness so Playwright can reliably produce at least one upload_audio request and assert multipart session_id routing after Done->Start and double Start transitions.

## Scope
1. Introduce stable media fixture for webrtc/index.html tests (record/cut/upload path).
2. Add upload-level assertion: request payload must include only new session_id after Start transition.
3. Keep test non-flaky in CI/headless profile.
4. Document fixture constraints and expected invariants.

## Acceptance
1. New E2E test fails if any post-Start upload uses old session_id.
2. Test passes deterministically in chromium-unauth profile across repeated runs.
3. No production runtime behavior changes required for test-only harness path.
close_reason: Delivered deterministic runtime upload-level E2E harness and assertions for Done->Start session_id routing; validated locally (chromium-unauth block green).

Test now intercepts multipart /api/voicebot/upload_audio and asserts session_id is new session only (never old). Added runtime probe hook window.__voicebotTestUpload in app/public/webrtc/webrtc-voicebot-lib.js to trigger production uploadBlob path without MediaRecorder timing dependency. Validation: PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 npx playwright test e2e/voice-fab-lifecycle.spec.ts --project=chromium-unauth --grep "done/start transition routing" => 2 passed.

title: Ontology: eliminate duplicate identity surfaces on subtype epistemic/evidence entities
description:
Problem
`visual_observation`, `assumption`, and `open_question` each introduce a subtype-specific `@key` while also inheriting a base identity (`evidence_observation_id` / `reasoning_item_id`). This gives one object two canonical identity surfaces and violates ontology-level sameness discipline.

Evidence
- ontology/typedb/schema/fragments/20-to-be/10-semantic-core.tql:634-703

Why it matters
Different keys can drift or be reused inconsistently, making equality and joins underdetermined for subtype instances.

Acceptance
- Each epistemic/evidence object has exactly one canonical identity surface.
- Subtypes rely on the base key or the base key is removed and identity is redefined consistently across schema, ingest, tests, and generated schema.
close_reason: Resolved in task-only migration: subtype epistemic/evidence entities now use a single inherited canonical key surface; duplicate subtype @keys removed from schema and ingest.

title: [qa][frontend-tests] migrate legacy popupClassName surfaces and remove jsdom console noise
description:
## Context
`app` test runs still have non-fatal console noise around legacy popup styling props and layout warnings. This noise hides real regressions and makes CI signal weaker.

Static scan shows many `popupClassName=` usages in shared selectors and Voice/CRM components.

## Scope
1. Inventory all `popupClassName` surfaces in `app/src` and classify by component type (Select, DatePicker, Dropdown, etc.).
2. For components where library contract marks `popupClassName` deprecated, migrate to canonical `classNames`/`styles` popup API.
3. Update related contract tests that currently pin exact `popupClassName` strings.
4. Add one guard test (or lint rule if feasible) to prevent reintroduction of deprecated popup prop usage in new code.
5. Ensure no functional/visual regression in Voice Tasks details and selectors.

## File surfaces
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/components/**`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/src/pages/**`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/__tests__/voice/**`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/app/__tests__/selectors/**`

## Plan (fix proposal only)
- Step A: compile a component-by-component migration table (component, current prop, target prop, risk).
- Step B: migrate low-risk shared selectors first (`ProjectSelect`, `OperationalTaskTypeSelect`).
- Step C: migrate high-traffic Voice/CRM forms and refresh contract tests to assert behavior instead of legacy prop literal.
- Step D: run focused suites and then full `app` test pack.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Deprecated popup-prop warnings are removed from focused `app` test runs for affected components.
2. Shared selector/voice contract tests pass with new canonical popup API.
3. No UI regression in dropdown width/placement for Voice Tasks and CRM create/edit flows.
4. A preventive check exists to avoid reintroducing deprecated popup-prop usage.
close_reason: Deprecated popupClassName runtime migration completed; guard + full app tests green

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Kickoff after close-session deploy. Planned sequence: (1) inventory all popupClassName usages in app/src + impacted tests, (2) migrate shared selectors first to canonical popup API, (3) migrate remaining high-traffic Voice/CRM forms, (4) update tests to assert behavior, (5) run focused suites then full app tests.

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Step A inventory complete. Found 24 popupClassName occurrences. Main runtime surfaces: shared selectors (ProjectSelect, OperationalTaskTypeSelect), CRMCreateTicket, CRMKanban, PossibleTasks, MeetingCard, AddParticipantModal, CRMPage, SessionsListPage. Test fixtures pinning legacy prop literals are present in sharedSelectOptionsReuseContract, possibleTasksDesignContract, meetingCardProjectSelectContract. Next: Step B migrate shared selectors first, then dependent Voice/CRM components, then update contract tests from literal-prop assertions to behavioral assertions.

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Step B/C implemented: migrated runtime surfaces from deprecated popupClassName to canonical classNames.popup.root across shared wrappers and Voice/CRM call-sites; updated contract tests and added preventive guard test (__tests__/selectors/noDeprecatedPopupPropsContract.test.ts) that fails on popupClassName= in app/src runtime files. Isolated tests pass (sharedSelectOptionsReuseContract, noDeprecatedPopupPropsContract, possibleTasksDesignContract, meetingCardProjectSelectContract). Full app run currently fails in unrelated suite __tests__/voice/createTasksPromptContract.test.ts (expects hardcoded 14d fallback text while source now uses LOOKBACK_DAYS wording).

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Final QA status: all targeted migration goals are complete. Runtime usage moved to classNames.popup.root across shared selectors and Voice/CRM call sites; guard test added to block popupClassName reintroduction in app/src. Isolated suites pass and full app test pack is green: npm test -> 109 passed, 109 total.

title: [voice][summary-notify] investigate missing chat summary after session_ready_to_summarize hook starts but dies without durable failure/retry
description:
Problem
Session 69ca581bbe02d5de23661e1b has a saved summary in Copilot, but the summary never arrived in chat. The current notify/audit chain claims summarize notify was accepted, yet there is no durable completion/failure signal and no Telegram delivery.

Forensic target
- session_id: 69ca581bbe02d5de23661e1b
- URL: https://copilot.stratospace.fun/voice/session/69ca581bbe02d5de23661e1b
- summary_correlation_id: fb1c135a-a9d7-480f-84e3-35481030c8c1

Evidence
- Session payload contains `summary_md_text` and `summary_saved_at=2026-03-30T14:51:52.709Z`, so summary generation/storage happened.
- Session log shows `notify_requested` for `session_ready_to_summarize`, `notify_hook_started`, and `notify_http_sent status=200 json_ack`.
- Hook log file `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/logs/voicebot-notify-hooks/2026-03-30T12-31-11-488Z__session_ready_to_summarize__69ca581bbe02d5de23661e1b__01__0636599a-31ab-458d-b86e-db1d5bc3651f.log` shows the detached StratoProject run started, performed early tool calls, then terminated with `asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError` followed by `KeyboardInterrupt`, before any Telegram send.
- There is no corresponding durable session-log failure/completion event for the detached hook outcome, and no automatic retry after the later summary save.
- `sessions/update_project` path enqueues `SESSION_READY_TO_SUMMARIZE` for done sessions with `source=project_update_after_done`, but does not write `summary_telegram_send` / `summary_save` audit rows or attach a correlation/idempotency envelope comparable to the `done_multiprompt` path.

Expected
- If summarize notify hook dies before Telegram send, the session must get a durable failed status/audit record and a retry path.
- Later successful summary save/generation must not leave chat delivery permanently lost.

Acceptance criteria
1. Root cause for the detached summarize-hook death is localized and fixed or fenced.
2. Failed summarize notify attempts become visible in durable session log / audit state instead of only inside a hook logfile.
3. A retry path exists so sessions like 69ca581bbe02d5de23661e1b can deliver summary after transient hook/process failure.
4. project-update-after-done summarize requests use the same correlation/idempotency-grade audit discipline as the done_multiprompt path, or an equivalent explicitly documented contract.
5. Regression coverage proves summary chat delivery is either completed or durably marked failed/retryable.
close_reason: Closed

comments.author: vp
comments.text:
Forensics
- Target session: `69ca581bbe02d5de23661e1b`
- Session had `summary_md_text` and `summary_saved_at`, so summary generation/storage succeeded in Copilot.
- Session log showed `notify_requested` + `notify_hook_started` + `notify_http_sent status=200 json_ack` for `session_ready_to_summarize`.
- Detached hook logfile showed the local StratoProject summarize runner died with `asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError` followed by `KeyboardInterrupt` before any Telegram send.
- Root cause: summarize notify path could look successful in session log while the detached local hook died without a durable failure state; project-update-after-done requests also lacked full correlation/idempotency parity with the canonical done_multiprompt path.

Implementation
- `backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/sessions.ts`
  - added correlation/idempotency-grade summarize envelope for `project_update_after_done`
  - prevented no-op `/update_project` calls from minting `summary_correlation_id`
  - prevented `summary_save` downgrade when a persisted summary already exists
  - added producer-side parity for manual retry route `trigger_session_ready_to_summarize` with `correlation_id` / `idempotency_key` and queued summary audit
- `backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/notifyHandler.ts`
  - changed summarize audit semantics from false-positive `done on HTTP ack` to `queued -> pending -> done/failed`
  - `done` now comes only from detached local hook zero-exit
  - `failed` is written durably for spawn failure, non-zero exit, HTTP failure, and semantic-ack failure
- `backend/src/services/voicebot/voicebotDoneNotify.ts`
  - added monotonic transition guards so `summary_telegram_send` / `summary_save` cannot be downgraded by later writes on the same correlation/idempotency identity
- `backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/doneMultiprompt.ts`
  - aligned `SESSION_READY_TO_SUMMARIZE` payload idempotency key with the queued audit row identity

Tests / regression coverage
- New or extended suites:
  - `backend/__tests__/voicebot/notify/doneNotifyService.test.ts`
  - `backend/__tests__/voicebot/notify/notifyWorkerEventLog.test.ts`
  - `backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/updateProjectRouteSummaryAudit.test.ts`
  - `backend/__tests__/voicebot/workers/workerDoneMultipromptHandler.test.ts`
  - `backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/triggerSummarizeRoute.test.ts`

Verification
- Targeted summarize/audit pack:
  - `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/backend && NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning --disable-warning=DEP0040' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/voicebot/notify/doneNotifyService.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/notify/notifyWorkerEventLog.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/runtime/updateProjectRouteSummaryAudit.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/workers/workerDoneMultipromptHandler.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/runtime/triggerSummarizeRoute.test.ts`
  - PASS: 5 suites, 24 tests.
- Broader backend pack:
  - `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/backend && npm run test:parallel-safe`
  - PASS: 144 suites, 736 tests.

Independent review trail
- First independent review round on backend summarize patch returned `NO-GO` with four concrete blockers:
  - race-prone `summary_telegram_send` status reconciliation
  - `summary_save` downgrade risk
  - no-op `update_project` side effect on `summary_correlation_id`
  - producer-side idempotency mismatch and retry-surface parity gaps
- All four blockers were addressed in code and covered by the targeted regression pack above.

Residual risk
- In a hypothetical runtime that uses HTTP summarize notify without local hooks and without downstream delivery callbacks, `summary_telegram_send` can remain non-terminal (`pending`) because the worker intentionally avoids false `done` on transport acceptance alone. That is a safer contract than false-positive delivery, but a richer external completion callback would be needed for terminal success in that topology.

Disposition
- Root cause localized and fenced.
- Durable failure state and retry-grade correlation/idempotency are now present across `done_multiprompt`, `project_update_after_done`, manual retry, and notify worker reconciliation.

comments.author: vp
comments.text:
Summary-notify closeout shipped: stable correlation/idempotency envelopes now flow through trigger_session_ready_to_summarize, update_project-after-done, done_multiprompt, and notify worker audit writes; the update_project parity test was added; and the default transcription view no longer renders per-segment timeline signatures inline.

Verification:
- app: npx jest --runInBand __tests__/voice/transcriptionFallbackErrorSignatureContract.test.ts __tests__/voice/transcriptionTimelineLabel.test.ts
- backend: NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/voicebot/notify/doneNotifyService.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/notify/notifyWorkerEventLog.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/runtime/triggerSummarizeRoute.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/runtime/updateProjectRouteSummaryAudit.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/workers/workerDoneMultipromptHandler.test.ts
- app build: npm run build
- backend build: npm run build

title: Fix copilot nginx 413 on voice upload
description: copilot.stratospace.fun and copilot-dev.stratospace.fun nginx server blocks missed client_max_body_size/proxy timeouts, causing 413 Request Entity Too Large on /api/voicebot/upload_audio from WebRTC Upload button. Sync active nginx configs with deploy contract (700m + 600s), reload nginx, and verify uploads return app-level auth error instead of nginx 413.
notes:
Applied in /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/copilot.conf and /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/copilot-dev.conf: client_max_body_size 700m, client_body_timeout 600s, plus proxy_read_timeout/proxy_send_timeout 600s under /api/. Reloaded nginx after successful nginx -t.
Verification: curl POST multipart with 2MB body to https://copilot.stratospace.fun/api/voicebot/upload_audio now returns HTTP 401 Unauthorized (app auth), not 413 nginx.

description:
Context:
После последних изменений в Voice/OperOps/Codex нужно актуализировать онтологию, чтобы schema + mapping + ingest + validate соответствовали фактическим runtime-контрактам и данным MongoDB.

Scope:
1) Проверить соответствие backend/app/workers контрактов и онтологии:
- backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/*
- backend/src/api/routes/crm/codex.ts
- backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/*
- app/src/pages/voice/*
- app/src/pages/operops/*
2) Обновить ontology/typedb/schema/str_opsportal_v1.tql и ontology/typedb/mappings/mongodb_to_typedb_v1.yaml при расхождениях.
3) Обновить ingest/validate tooling при необходимости:
- ontology/typedb/scripts/typedb-ontology-ingest.py
- ontology/typedb/scripts/typedb-ontology-validate.py
- ontology/typedb/queries/validation_v1.tql
4) Актуализировать документацию:
- ontology/README.md
- ontology/AGENTS.md
- ontology/typedb/README.md
- ontology/typedb/AGENTS.md
- CHANGELOG.md

Out of scope:
- Функциональные изменения UI/API, не требуемые для выравнивания data model.

Definition of done:
Онтология и tooling синхронизированы с текущими контрактами, валидация проходит, документация обновлена.
acceptance_criteria:
1) Все найденные расхождения между runtime-контрактами и TypeDB артефактами зафиксированы и закрыты изменениями в schema/mapping/queries.
2) Из backend выполняются команды:
- npm run ontology:typedb:py:setup
- npm run ontology:typedb:ingest:dry
- npm run ontology:typedb:validate
без ошибок уровня fail.
3) Если применялся apply, ingestion выполняется идемпотентно (повторный запуск не создаёт неконсистентные дубликаты связей).
4) Проверки orphan/runtime-tag/anchor/done-contract в validation_v1.tql отражают актуальные runtime требования.
5) Документация ontology/* и CHANGELOG.md обновлены синхронно с фактическими изменениями.
notes: Ожидаемый формат результата: список выявленных расхождений (before/after), перечень изменённых сущностей/атрибутов/relations, вывод dry-run и apply/validate, и короткий операторский runbook по повторяемому запуску.
close_reason: Completed ontology sync wave: gap matrix, schema, mapping, validation pack, ingest/validate tooling alignment, docs/changelog and verification cycle

title: [ontology-sync] Audit runtime contracts and build ontology gap matrix
description: Собрать и формализовать матрицу расхождений между актуальными runtime-контрактами (Voice/OperOps/Codex) и текущими TypeDB артефактами. Включить backend routes/workers + frontend source contracts, которые влияют на ontology schema/mapping.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Сформирован список расхождений с привязкой к файлам/контрактам. 2) Для каждого расхождения указан целевой артефакт изменения (schema/mapping/query/script/docs). 3) Матрица пригодна как source-of-truth для следующих подзадач.
notes: Выходной формат: таблица gap matrix (contract -> current ontology -> required change -> risk).
close_reason: Gap matrix documented in ontology/typedb/docs/runtime_contract_gap_matrix_v1.md and linked from rollout_plan_v1.md

title: [ontology-sync] Update TypeDB schema str_opsportal_v1.tql
description: Обновить ontology/typedb/schema/str_opsportal_v1.tql по результатам gap matrix: сущности, атрибуты, relation roles, runtime diagnostics поля и контракты voice/session/task доменов.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Schema отражает все утверждённые контракты из gap matrix. 2) Нет silent-breaking изменений ключевых ID/roles без явной фиксации в docs. 3) Проверяемая консистентность с mapping/validation обязательна.
notes: Все изменения schema должны быть атомарными и трассируемыми по пунктам gap matrix.
close_reason: Updated str_opsportal_v1.tql with Codex/runtime task attributes, project git_repo, and voice_session_sources_oper_task relation per gap matrix

title: [ontology-sync] Update MongoDB->TypeDB mapping contract
description: Актуализировать ontology/typedb/mappings/mongodb_to_typedb_v1.yaml под обновлённую schema и фактические Mongo поля/relations, включая runtime-tag и voice merge/anchor контракт.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Mapping покрывает все поля/relations, требуемые schema. 2) Нет ссылок на устаревшие/несуществующие роли. 3) Все owner_lookup/relation блоки валидны и согласованы с TypeQL schema.
notes: Критично: сохранить идемпотентность relation insert логики через корректные ключи и role binding.
close_reason: Updated mongodb_to_typedb_v1.yaml for project git_repo, expanded automation_tasks Codex/runtime fields, and added voice_session_sources_oper_task relation mapping

title: [ontology-sync] Refresh validation query pack and quality gates
description: Обновить ontology/typedb/queries/validation_v1.tql: orphan checks, runtime-tag completeness, anchor integrity, session done-contract и другие актуальные quality gates.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Validation query pack покрывает обязательные runtime-контракты. 2) Проверки выражают различие data-quality проблем (orphan/mismatch/missing fields). 3) Запросы исполнимы в текущем TypeDB runtime.
notes: Сфокусироваться на диагностической ценности: минимизировать шум и ложные срабатывания.
close_reason: Extended validation_v1.tql with OperTask/Codex runtime quality gates (lineage, deferred-review, project git_repo, runtime_tag completeness); runtime validate currently blocked by stale DB schema missing voice_session_merge_log and deferred to gym6.5 setup cycle

title: [ontology-sync] Align ingest/validate scripts and run verification cycle
description: При необходимости обновить ingest/validate tooling (typedb-ontology-ingest.py, typedb-ontology-validate.py) и выполнить проверочный цикл setup + ingest:dry + validate (и apply при необходимости).
acceptance_criteria: 1) Команды npm run ontology:typedb:py:setup / ingest:dry / validate проходят. 2) Если выполнялся apply, повторный прогон не создаёт неконсистентные дубли отношений. 3) Все ошибки/ограничения задокументированы с reproducible шагами.
notes: Зафиксировать краткий execution log с командами и итогами (pass/fail + причины).
close_reason: Aligned ingest/validate tooling: automation_tasks now mapping-driven in typedb-ontology-ingest.py; fixed typedb-ontology-validate anchor checks and added Codex/task quality gates; ran ontology:typedb:py:setup, ontology:typedb:ingest:dry, ontology:typedb:ingest:apply --init-schema (sample), and ontology:typedb:validate successfully (with expected WARN counters)

title: [ontology-sync] Update ontology docs and CHANGELOG with operator runbook
description: Синхронизировать документацию ontology/* и корневой CHANGELOG.md с фактическими изменениями онтологии и tooling; добавить краткий операторский runbook повторяемого запуска.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Обновлены ontology/README.md, ontology/AGENTS.md, ontology/typedb/README.md, ontology/typedb/AGENTS.md и CHANGELOG.md. 2) Документация согласована с реально внесёнными изменениями. 3) Runbook позволяет воспроизвести цикл проверки без дополнительных предположений.
notes: Отражать только подтверждённые изменения; избегать плановых формулировок без фактической реализации.
close_reason: Updated ontology docs and root CHANGELOG with copilot-gym6 runtime-parity changes and verified operator runbook (setup/ingest/validate incl. Mongo directConnection workaround)

title: processingLoop session filter excludes documents with missing is_waiting

title: [tests][voice] parallel-safe fails on stale-create-tasks-repair and sessions list parity suites
description:
Problem
`npm run test:parallel-safe` в `copilot/backend` стабильно падает на двух сьютах, даже при локальном запуске только этих тестов:
- `__tests__/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.test.ts` (3 падения)
- `__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.sessionParity.test.ts` (1 падение)

Severity
high

Repro
1. `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/backend`
2. `NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.sessionParity.test.ts`
3. Получить 4 стабильных падения:
  - `createTasksStaleProcessingRepair`: expected candidates/repaired `1`, actual `0`
  - `sessionParity`: expected response body length `1`, actual `0`

Forensics / Root Cause

1) `createTasksStaleProcessingRepair` test failures
- Test file: `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.test.ts`
- Runtime logic: `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.ts`
- Ключевая причина: в `resolveLatestCreateTasksMarkerMs` учитывается `session._id` timestamp как один из кандидатов latest marker (`parseDateMs(session._id)`), и берется `Math.max(...)`.
- В тестовой фикстуре `session._id` создается `new ObjectId()` “сейчас”, поэтому age становится “слишком свежим”, и ветка уходит в `skip_recent` вместо `repair`.
- Симптом: `candidates=0`, `repaired=0` там, где тест ожидает `repair`.

2) `sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.sessionParity` failure
- Test file: `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.sessionParity.test.ts`
- Route logic: `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/sessions.ts` (`listSessions`)
- Ключевая причина: `listSessions` теперь пересчитывает `message_count` через `resolveSessionListMessageCounts(...)` (aggregate по `VOICE_BOT_MESSAGES`) и затем фильтрует visible sessions:
  - оставить, если `is_deleted === true` ИЛИ `message_count > 0` ИЛИ `is_active !== false`.
- В тестовом `rawDbStub` для `VOICE_BOT_MESSAGES` aggregate возвращает пусто (`[]`), поэтому `message_count` становится `0`, а сессионная фикстура имеет `is_active: false` и не `is_deleted`.
- Итог: сессия отфильтровывается, `response.body` пустой (`length=0`), ожидание `length=1` падает.

Impact
- `test:parallel-safe` в текущем состоянии не green.
- Тестовые регрессии маскируют реальные падения и ломают quality-gate для изменений в voice surface.

Expected
- `test:parallel-safe` проходит стабильно.
- Тесты отражают актуальные правила stale-repair и list visibility без ложных падений.

Fix directions
- Для stale-repair:
  - либо скорректировать логику marker resolution (не использовать `_id` как “latest marker” при наличии явных CREATE_TASKS marker’ов),
  - либо обновить тестовые фикстуры/ожидания, если это поведение теперь считается canonical.
- Для session parity:
  - обновить тестовую фикстуру, чтобы mock `VOICE_BOT_MESSAGES.aggregate` возвращал message_count > 0 для проверяемой сессии,
  - и/или явно проверять новую visibility-логику, а не старое предположение.

Acceptance criteria
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.sessionParity.test.ts` проходит без падений.
- `npm run test:parallel-safe` не падает из-за этих двух сьютов.
- В PR/фиксе есть явное пояснение, что именно изменено: production logic vs test fixtures.
close_reason: Closed

title: [tests][voice] stale create_tasks repair suite drifts due to ObjectId timestamp marker precedence
description:
Problem
Падает suite `__tests__/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.test.ts` (3 кейса).  
Симптом: вместо ожидаемого `repair` сервис классифицирует кандидата как `skip_recent`, из-за чего `candidates/repaired = 0`.

Forensics
- Тест: `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.test.ts`
- Логика: `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.ts`
- Триггер: `resolveLatestCreateTasksMarkerMs()` включает `parseDateMs(session._id)` в набор маркеров и берет `Math.max(...)`.
- В фикстурах `session._id = new ObjectId()` генерируется “текущим временем”, поэтому возраст кандидата становится слишком маленьким и условие stale не выполняется.

Decision Frame
Нужно явно выбрать контракт: что является источником “latest marker” для stale-repair.

План исправлений (без реализации)
1. Уточнить продуктовый контракт stale-repair
   - Зафиксировать в комментарии/доке, что приоритетно: `CREATE_TASKS job/request markers` или fallback на `session._id`.
   - Определить допустимость использования `_id` только как аварийного fallback, когда нет ни одного явного маркера.

2. Нормализовать алгоритм `resolveLatestCreateTasksMarkerMs`
   - Вариант A (рекомендуемый): исключить `_id` из `Math.max(...)`, если присутствует хотя бы один explicit CREATE_TASKS marker.
   - Вариант B (если хотим оставить текущий runtime-контракт): оставить код как есть, но переписать фикстуры тестов так, чтобы `_id` не был “свежее” business-маркеров.
   - Выбрать один вариант и зафиксировать rationale в issue/PR.

3. Перестроить тестовые фикстуры под выбранный контракт
   - Для кейсов `repair` обеспечить детерминированный возраст stale:
     - либо статические ObjectId с “старыми” timestamp,
     - либо прямой контроль source markers без зависимости от `_id`.
   - Для `skip_recent` оставить отдельный тест, подтверждающий свежий marker path.

4. Добавить защитные тесты на приоритет marker sources
   - Явный тест: “если есть CREATE_TASKS marker, `_id` не меняет stale verdict”.
   - Явный тест: fallback на `_id` работает только при отсутствии всех CREATE_TASKS markers.

5. Прогон и приемка
   - Точечный запуск suite:
     `NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.test.ts`
   - Затем `npm run test:parallel-safe` для проверки quality-gate.

Acceptance Criteria
- Все кейсы в `createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.test.ts` green.
- Поведение stale-repair детерминировано и явно документировано.
- Нет скрытой зависимости тестов от текущего времени генерации ObjectId.
notes:
## Definition of Done (DoD)
- [ ] Контракт stale-marker formalized: приоритет explicit CREATE_TASKS markers зафиксирован и согласован.
- [ ] В issue/PR зафиксировано решение: runtime-логика меняется ИЛИ только тестовые фикстуры приводятся к текущему контракту.
- [ ] Тестовые фикстуры не зависят от текущего времени генерации `ObjectId` (детерминированные marker timestamps).
- [ ] Добавлен отдельный test-кейс: explicit CREATE_TASKS marker имеет приоритет над `_id` при вычислении latest marker.
- [ ] Добавлен отдельный test-кейс: fallback на `_id` срабатывает только при отсутствии explicit CREATE_TASKS markers.
- [ ] Green run: `NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/services/voicebot/createTasksStaleProcessingRepair.test.ts`.
- [ ] Green run: `npm run test:parallel-safe` (без падений по stale-repair suite).
- [ ] В changelog/PR note явно отражено, почему устранен дрейф и какой контракт теперь canonical.
close_reason: Closed

title: [tests][voice] sessions list runtime parity suite uses stale visibility assumptions
description:
Problem
Падает `__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.sessionParity.test.ts` в кейсе `POST /voicebot/list ...`.
Симптом: ожидался `response.body.length = 1`, фактически `0`.

Forensics
- Тест: `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.sessionParity.test.ts`
- Route: `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/sessions.ts` (`listSessions`)
- Текущая runtime-логика:
  - пересчет `message_count` через `resolveSessionListMessageCounts()` (aggregate по `VOICE_BOT_MESSAGES`);
  - фильтрация visible sessions: оставить, если
    `is_deleted === true` ИЛИ `message_count > 0` ИЛИ `is_active !== false`.
- В фикстуре aggregate для `VOICE_BOT_MESSAGES` возвращает пусто (`[]`), значит `message_count=0`, а сессия `is_active:false` и не `is_deleted`, поэтому корректно отфильтровывается.

Decision Frame
Это, вероятнее всего, тестовый дрейф относительно новой видимости списка сессий, а не баг прод-логики.

План исправлений (без реализации)
1. Зафиксировать целевой контракт list visibility
   - В явном виде описать в тесте/комментарии, что `POST /voicebot/list` не должен возвращать “пустые и неактивные” сессии.
   - Подтвердить, что критерий видимости синхронизирован с UI-ожиданием.

2. Переписать fixture текущего failing-кейса под актуальный контракт
   - Добавить mock для `VOICE_BOT_MESSAGES.aggregate`, который вернет `count > 0` по test session id.
   - Либо поставить `is_active: true` если цель кейса — только проверка отсутствия runtime_tag фильтров в pipeline.
   - Убрать неявное допущение “сессия без сообщений и inactive должна быть видимой”.

3. Декомпозировать проверки в 2 независимых теста
   - Тест A: проверка pipeline parity (`$match` без runtime_tag оберток) на видимой сессии.
   - Тест B: проверка visibility policy (скрывать `message_count=0 && is_active=false && !is_deleted`).

4. Усилить helper-фикстуры runtime parity
   - В `sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.test.helpers.ts` добавить утилиту для стандартного messages-count aggregate mock, чтобы похожие тесты не дрейфовали.

5. Прогон и приемка
   - Точечный запуск suite:
     `NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.sessionParity.test.ts`
   - Затем `npm run test:parallel-safe`.

Acceptance Criteria
- `sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.sessionParity.test.ts` green и отражает текущий runtime контракт.
- Проверка pipeline parity и проверка visibility policy разведены и не конфликтуют.
- Нет ложного падения из-за неполного fixture aggregate для `VOICE_BOT_MESSAGES`.
notes:
## Definition of Done (DoD)
- [ ] Visibility contract для `POST /voicebot/list` явно зафиксирован: visibility определяется через `is_deleted`, `is_active`, `message_count`.
- [ ] Fixture parity-теста обновлен под актуальный контракт (валидный `VOICE_BOT_MESSAGES.aggregate` count или эквивалентно видимая сессия).
- [ ] Убрано неявное предположение: inactive session без сообщений не должна считаться видимой по умолчанию.
- [ ] Проверки декомпозированы на 2 независимых теста: pipeline parity и visibility policy.
- [ ] В helper-фикстуры добавлен стандартный mock-path для messages-count aggregate, чтобы исключить повторный дрейф.
- [ ] Green run: `NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --runInBand __tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionsRuntimeCompatibilityRoute.sessionParity.test.ts`.
- [ ] Green run: `npm run test:parallel-safe` (без падений по session parity suite).
- [ ] В changelog/PR note зафиксировано, что причина была в test drift относительно runtime visibility policy.
close_reason: Closed

title: [voice][tasks] investigate zero tasks for session 69c4d5c9d0f4bd2984b4de36
description:
## Problem
Для сессии `69c4d5c9d0f4bd2984b4de36` (Ural BortProvodnik, Ural RMS) задачи не созданы, хотя по формулировкам в итогах есть явно материализуемые action items.

## Evidence
Текущее состояние проверено через Voice/OperOps:

title: [qa][backend][logger] Stop winston console transport from flooding passing Jest output
description:
## Контекст
`/home/strato-space/copilot/plan/2026-03-27-test-noise.md` показывает, что backend test runs захламляются не тестовыми assertion failures, а operational/logging output от реального winston logger.

Типовые шумные записи из passing suites:
- `[voicebot.create_tickets] routing decision`
- `[voicebot.sessions] taskflow_refresh_emit`
- `[voicebot.upload_audio] started/file_processed/completed`
- expected negative-path errors/warns, которые печатаются в консоль даже когда test pass

## Локализация причины
1. Backend test scripts запускают обычный runtime без отдельного test logger contract:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/package.json:17`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/package.json:18`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/package.json:19`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/package.json:20`

2. Глобальный logger всегда создает Console transport:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/utils/logger.ts:53`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/utils/logger.ts:63`

3. `getLogger()` auto-initialize path делает это даже без явного bootstrap, поэтому module import в тестах уже достаточно для console spam:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/utils/logger.ts:95`

4. Только малая часть тестов мокает logger explicitly; это уже существующий repo pattern, но он не системный:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/api/crmCodexRouteRuntime.test.ts:31`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/api/crmTicketsTemporalRouteRuntime.test.ts:18`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/services/bdClient.test.ts:26`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/generatePossibleTasksRoute.test.ts:49`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/voicebot/workers/workerIngressHandlers.test.ts:23`

При этом многие шумные suites logger не изолируют, например:
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/uploadAudioRoute.test.ts:34`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/uploads.ts:30`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/sessionUtilityRuntimeBehavior.codexRouting.test.ts:1`

## Онтологическая самопроверка (greek-scholastic)
### Нормализация терминов
- `test noise` = вывод, не являющийся assertion signal или required failure artifact.
- `logger signal` = структурированная диагностика runtime, ценная в prod/dev, но не обязана печататься в stdout passing Jest runs.
- `починка` = изменение test/runtime logging contract, а не бизнес-логики маршрутов Voice/CRM.

### Проверка онтологии
Это не баг доменных сущностей (`task`, `voice_session`, `performer_profile`) и не дефект прикладных маршрутов как таковых.
Объект поломки — test harness boundary между Jest и backend logger runtime.

Контрпример: один и тот же route test может pass полностью корректно, но засорять stdout из-за Console transport. Значит источник — не domain failure, а infrastructure-level logging policy mismatch.

## План починки
1. Ввести явный backend test logging contract:
   - либо silent/noop Console transport under Jest,
   - либо centralized mock/capture logger bootstrap,
   - либо opt-in verbosity only for tests, которые действительно проверяют log output.
2. Сохранить file/structured logging semantics вне test runtime.
3. Для suites с expected negative-path logs перейти с console side effects на explicit assertions against mocked/captured logger calls.
4. Убедиться, что passing backend tests не печатают штатные `info/warn/error` runtime logs по умолчанию.

## Acceptance criteria
1. `cd /home/strato-space/copilot/backend && npm test` больше не засоряется штатными winston runtime logs в passing suites.
2. Tests, которым нужны log assertions, проверяют их явно через mocks/capture, а не через unbounded stdout spam.
3. Production/dev logging behavior не деградирует.
4. Решение централизовано, а не сведено к точечному моку в каждом отдельном test file.

## Session note
В этой сессии implementation не запускается; issue создается как backlog artifact only.
close_reason: Added centralized Jest-aware logger contract: Console transport off by default in tests (opt-in via LOGS_TEST_CONSOLE), with regression tests and clean noisy suite verification.

Code changes:

  - Added test-runtime detection (NODE_ENV=test or JEST_WORKER_ID present).
  - Added shouldEnableConsoleTransport() gate.
  - Console transport is attached only when not in test runtime, or when LOGS_TEST_CONSOLE is explicitly enabled.
  - File and error-file transports remain unchanged.
- backend/__tests__/services/logger.test.ts
  - Added regression: no console transport by default in Jest.
  - Added regression: console transport appears when LOGS_TEST_CONSOLE=1.

Validation:

- Result: PASS (2 suites, 11 tests).
- Practical check: previously noisy uploadAudioRoute test now runs without winston console flood in stdout.

Scope note:

title: Audit beads SQLite→Dolt migration fidelity: are issues migrated with full history
description: Read upstream migration code to verify what is migrated from SQLite to Dolt (issues, dependencies, events, comments, metadata, timeline fidelity).
notes: Reviewed upstream migration code in /tmp/beads-upstream-20260224. Findings: migration imports issues+labels+dependencies+events from SQLite, but does not preserve full history semantics. (1) It creates a single Dolt commit at migration time (cmd/bd/migrate_dolt.go:121-124), so pre-migration version/commit history is not reconstructable in Dolt history. (2) events are imported from events table only (cmd/bd/migrate_shim.go:279-303, cmd/bd/migrate_dolt.go:332-354) with no ORDER BY, then iterated via map in importer (cmd/bd/migrate_import.go:181-189), so strict event ordering is not guaranteed. (3) issue metadata JSON is not selected/inserted in migration SQL (cmd/bd/migrate_shim.go:206-237, cmd/bd/migrate_import.go:101-123). (4) dependency metadata/thread_id are not selected/imported (cmd/bd/migrate_shim.go:261-264, cmd/bd/migrate_import.go:169-172).

title: [operops][codex] Relationships: dependents(type=blocks) ошибочно показаны как Children (parent-child)
description:
Контекст
- Экран: OperOps -> Codex task details
- Пример: https://copilot.stratospace.fun/operops/codex/task/copilot-8gto.3

Проблема
В блоке Relationships задачи `copilot-8gto.3` UI показывает `copilot-8gto.4` и `copilot-8gto.9` в секции `Children (parent-child)`, хотя по данным bd это не children, а dependents по типу `blocks` (т.е. задачи, которые зависят от текущей).

Фактические связи в bd для copilot-8gto.3
- Parent (parent-child): `copilot-8gto`
- Blocks dependencies (issue is blocked by): `copilot-8gto.1`, `copilot-8gto.2`
- Blocks dependents (issues blocked by current): `copilot-8gto.4`, `copilot-8gto.9`

Как воспроизвести
1) Открыть `copilot-8gto.3` в OperOps/Codex.
2) Сверить секции Relationships с `bd show copilot-8gto.3 --json`.
3) Увидеть, что `copilot-8gto.4` и `copilot-8gto.9` отображены в `Children (parent-child)`.

Ожидаемое поведение
- `Children (parent-child)` должно содержать только связи dependency_type=`parent-child` где текущая задача является parent.
- Связи dependency_type=`blocks` нужно показывать в отдельной секции (например, `Blocks` / `Blocked issues` / `Dependents (blocks)`), без смешивания с parent-child.
- Подписи секций должны соответствовать реальному dependency_type из bd.

Важно
Это data-semantics bug в UI группировке relationships, не ошибка данных в bd.
acceptance_criteria: 1) UI Relationships строго соответствует семантике bd show: PARENT (parent-child upward), DEPENDS ON (blocks dependencies/down), BLOCKS (blocks dependents/up). 2) Для copilot-8gto.3 отображение: PARENT=copilot-8gto; DEPENDS ON={copilot-8gto.1, copilot-8gto.2}; BLOCKS={copilot-8gto.4, copilot-8gto.9}. 3) Секция Children (parent-child) показывает только реальных parent-child children; при их отсутствии секция пуста/скрыта. 4) Лейблы секций не смешивают dependency_type и direction.
notes:
[2026-03-03] Дополнительный кейс по скриншоту карточки copilot-8gto.3: секция 'Children (parent-child)' по-прежнему содержит copilot-8gto.4 и copilot-8gto.9 (это blocks-dependents, а не parent-child children). Секция 'Blocks' корректно показывает статусы зависимостей: copilot-8gto.1=closed, copilot-8gto.2=in_progress. Вывод: ошибка именно в семантической группировке/лейбле Children, а не в загрузке статусов зависимостей.
[2026-03-03] Принята целевая модель из bd show (строго): PARENT ↑, DEPENDS ON →, BLOCKS ←. UI должен повторять именно эту семантику без переименования blocks-dependents в children.
[2026-03-03] Fix implemented: Relationships semantics in OperOps/Codex details card

What changed
- `dependents` are no longer routed to `Children` by default.
- Routing is now type-aware by direction:
  - dependencies(type=blocks|waits-for) -> `Depends On (blocks/waits-for)`
  - dependents(type=blocks|waits-for) -> `Blocks (dependents)`
  - parent-child upward -> `Parent (parent-child)`
  - parent-child downward -> `Children (parent-child)`
- Updated relationship labels to reflect dependency type + direction clearly.

Files
- app/src/components/codex/CodexIssueDetailsCard.tsx
- app/__tests__/operops/codexIssueDetailsCardContract.test.ts

Verification
1) Frontend tests
- cd app && npm run test -- __tests__/operops/codexIssueDetailsCardContract.test.ts __tests__/operops/codexTaskPageContract.test.ts __tests__/voice/codexTasksInlineDetailsContract.test.ts
- Result: PASS (3 suites, 11 tests)

2) Type-safety gate
- cd app && npm run build
- Result: PASS

3) MCP Chrome manual check
- URL: https://copilot.stratospace.fun/operops/codex/task/copilot-8gto.3
- Result: `copilot-8gto.4` and `copilot-8gto.9` are displayed under `Blocks (dependents)`, not `Children (parent-child)`.
- Screenshot: /home/strato-space/copilot/tmp/copilot-i57c-relationships-fix.png

title: Настроить автоматическое закрытие сессий по таймауту без ручного вмешательства
description:
Task: Настроить автоматическое закрытие сессий по таймауту без ручного вмешательства
Реализовать триггер автозакрытия сессии при отсутствии новых чанков в течении 10 минут и убрать необходимость ручного закрытия. Если на момент закрытия сессии название не было определено, генерировать его с помощью штатного процесса.

Source: Voice session https://copilot.stratospace.fun/voice/session/69bfda8a63c3f038ea06ceaf
Creator: Валерий Сысик

comments.author: vp
comments.text:
Requested execution tag `copilot-i75q` conflicts with an existing unrelated open bd issue (`Настроить автоматическое закрытие сессий по таймауту...`).
I am keeping that issue untouched and tracking this bug under a dedicated bd issue to avoid corrupting issue semantics.

comments.author: vp
comments.text: Execution split started. Scope is two bounded slices: (1) backend/runtime auto-close trigger for inactive active sessions with 10-minute timeout and canonical missing-title generation on close; (2) focused regression coverage + operator/runtime contract for scheduled execution so the flow works without manual intervention.

comments.author: vp
comments.text:
Контекст для автономного выполнения:
- Цель задачи: автоматически закрывать активные voice-сессии без ручного `Done`, если в течение 10 минут не появлялись новые чанки/сообщения активности.
- Закрытие должно идти только через штатный done-flow, а не через ad hoc обновление полей в Mongo. Источник истины по close contract: `POST /api/voicebot/session_done` и связанный backend service/path.
- Если на момент auto-close у сессии нет `session_name`, название должно генерироваться через canonical `generate_session_title`, без прямой записи имени в обход штатного процесса.
- Уже существующие поверхности, которые нужно использовать, а не изобретать заново:
  - `backend/scripts/voicebot-close-inactive-sessions.ts`
  - `backend/src/workers/voicebot/runner.ts`
  - `backend/src/services/voicebot/voicebotInactiveSessionService.ts`
  - `backend/src/services/voicebot/voicebotSessionTitleService.ts`
  - `backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/shared/closeInactiveSessions.ts`
  - tests в `backend/__tests__/services/voicebotInactiveSessionService.test.ts` и `backend/__tests__/scripts/*`
- Операционная модель: threshold = 10 minutes inactivity; inactivity должна считаться по последней реальной активности сессии/сообщений/чанков, а не по произвольному client-side timestamp.
- Что считать завершением:
  1. scheduler/worker умеет периодически запускать проверку inactive active sessions;
  2. подходящая сессия переводится в closed через canonical done-flow;
  3. если имени нет, после close запускается canonical title generation;
  4. повторный проход не должен повторно закрывать уже закрытую сессию;
  5. есть regression coverage на threshold, auto-close path и missing-title path.
- Проверка результата: targeted backend tests + build; затем живая проверка на runtime, что inactive session закрывается без ручного вмешательства и не ломает realtime/session list semantics.

title: parallel-task creates stray ephemeral tmp issue (tmp-parse-check) during plan bootstrap
description: During parallel-task bootstrap for plan execution, an extra ephemeral issue (example: copilot-zewv, title=tmp-parse-check, ephemeral=true) was created in the main backlog without dependencies and remained open until manual cleanup. Evidence from .beads events timeline: copilot-zktc created at 08:27:18, stray copilot-zewv created at 08:27:48, then planned child tasks created at 08:28:23-08:28:24. This indicates a parser/bootstrap probe leaking into persistent issue storage instead of being in-memory or auto-closed. Expected: no synthetic tmp issues appear in backlog/ready pipeline.
notes:
RCA update (2026-03-03):

Evidence collected:
1) DB events timeline proves deterministic insertion point:
   - 08:27:18 local: copilot-zktc created
   - 08:27:48 local: copilot-zewv (title=tmp-parse-check, ephemeral=true) created
   - 08:28:23-08:28:24 local: planned child tasks copilot-zktc.1..11 created
2) copilot-zewv payload is synthetic (ephemeral=true, no dependencies, no description) and does not match user-created issue shape.
3) Repo-level code/skills do not contain literal tmp-parse-check and no backend/app path can create bd issues with that title.
4) The artifact appears only in beads mutation stream (daemon log) as an isolated create event between plan bootstrap and child issue fan-out.

Conclusion:
- Root cause is an orchestration bootstrap/probe leak in the external parallel-task runner path (outside /home/strato-space/copilot codebase).
- The temporary parse-check bead is written to persistent issues instead of in-memory/temp context or immediate auto-close.

Required fix location:
- parallel-task orchestration runtime (agent/runner platform), not copilot backend/frontend code.

Recommended fix contract:
- Do not persist parse probes as issues, OR auto-close+hide them transactionally before ready/list surfaces are computed.
- Add regression: running parallel-task bootstrap on a plan must not increase open issues by synthetic tmp-* beads.
Status update 2026-03-03: blocked as external runner defect. Additional attribution: parallel-task/super-swarm skill docs are present under /root/.agents/skills but contain orchestration prompts only; no local runtime code path in /home/strato-space/copilot creates tmp-parse-check. Required fix remains in external orchestration runtime that handles /parallel-task bootstrap.
RCA correction 2026-03-03: root cause is a direct agent tool call recorded in Codex session log, not external runner internals. Evidence: /root/.codex/sessions/2026/02/28/rollout-2026-02-28T05-49-31-019ca226-b30c-7181-bdf0-62b891464a25.jsonl line 7344 contains function_call exec_command with cmd='cd /home/strato-space/copilot && bd create "tmp-parse-check" --ephemeral --json'. This call happened between parent issue discovery (line 7337) and child task fan-out script start (line 7351).
Implemented guardrail in AGENTS.md (Issue Tracking -> Important Rules): explicit prohibition on synthetic temporary bd issues (tmp-*/parse-check) including ephemeral probes; orchestration probes must stay in memory/logs. This is process-level mitigation for recurrence.
close_reason: RCA completed; source traced to direct agent bd create probe call. Added AGENTS.md guardrail forbidding synthetic tmp/parse-check issues (including ephemeral probes) to prevent recurrence.

title: [voice][session_tasks] persisted Draft rows with malformed priority values crash session_tasks read route
description:
Problem
Session `69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da` returns `POST /api/voicebot/session_tasks -> 500` on the Voice page even though Draft task rows already exist in Mongo. The read route crashes while validating persisted `automation_tasks` docs instead of degrading gracefully.

Severity
critical

Observed on
- session URL: https://copilot.stratospace.fun/voice/session/69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da?page=1&pageSize=100
- browser console: repeated `POST /api/voicebot/session_tasks 500` during subscribe replay / refresh
- backend prod log around `2026-03-25 09:57:45` and `09:59:40`: `Error in session_tasks: [ontology-collection-adapter] collection automation_tasks field priority violates enum domain for ontology attr priority: 🔥 P2`
- stack: `assertValueAgainstSpec -> assertPossibleTaskMongoDocumentShape -> validatePossibleTaskMasterDocs -> listSessionScopedDraftTasks -> /api/voicebot/session_tasks`

Persisted data evidence
Mongo for this session already contains 5 non-deleted `automation_tasks` rows linked canonically to the same voice session:
- `voice-69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da-01` priority `🔥 P2`
- `voice-69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da-02` priority `🔥 P3`
- `voice-69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da-03` priority `🔥 P3`
- `voice-69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da-04` priority `🔥 P3`
- `voice-69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da-05` priority `🔥 P4`
All rows already have correct linkage semantics:
- `external_ref = https://copilot.stratospace.fun/voice/session/69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da`
- `source_ref = https://copilot.stratospace.fun/operops/task/<mongo_id>`
- `source_data.session_id = 69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da`

Why this is distinct from existing bugs
- Not a duplicate of old `external_ref/source_ref` visibility bugs (`copilot-ztlv.7`, `copilot-ztlv.27`, `copilot-jhvx`): linkage is already canonical and rows are present.
- Related to `copilot-adb9`, but not identical: `copilot-adb9` captures create-time persistence failure when extraction cannot write rows. This session demonstrates the read-side fallout: previously persisted malformed rows make `/api/voicebot/session_tasks` hard-fail with 500 and blank the Tasks tab. Fixing only new writes will not repair or safely read existing bad rows.

Impact
- Voice session `Задачи` tab becomes unusable for affected sessions
- repeated websocket/manual refreshes keep hammering the same 500 path
- operators cannot inspect already materialized Draft rows from the session page despite data existing in Mongo

Repro
1. Open `https://copilot.stratospace.fun/voice/session/69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da?page=1&pageSize=100`
2. Wait for session subscribe replay or reload the page
3. Observe repeated `POST /api/voicebot/session_tasks 500` in browser console
4. Inspect backend log and see ontology enum validation error for `🔥 P2`
5. Query Mongo and confirm 5 linked Draft rows already exist for this session

Actual
The session-scoped Draft read path validates persisted docs strictly and aborts the whole response with 500 when one row carries a priority outside the current ontology enum domain.

Expected
`/api/voicebot/session_tasks` must not 500 on malformed historical rows. The route should either normalize tolerated legacy priority values, skip/quarantine invalid rows while returning the rest, or rely on a migration that repairs bad data before strict validation. The Tasks tab must stay readable for already materialized sessions.

Acceptance criteria
- Opening session `69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da` no longer produces `POST /api/voicebot/session_tasks 500`
- persisted malformed legacy priorities do not crash the entire Draft read surface
- there is an explicit strategy for historical bad rows: migration, normalization-on-read, or quarantine with observability
- regression coverage exists for reading a session whose persisted Draft rows contain legacy emoji priority values
close_reason: Fixed in main: legacy-priority read compatibility prevents session_tasks 500

Draft read path now runs legacy-compatible normalization and skips malformed legacy rows instead of failing whole route (backend/src/services/voicebot/persistPossibleTasks.ts validatePossibleTaskMasterDocs read-legacy-compatible). /api/voicebot/session_tasks route consumes this path. Live repro session 69c27fd63b94e66785ee67da now returns 200 for session_tasks and Tasks tab is readable. title: Codex Relationships: link+copy parity with Issue ID + status pictograms (post-epic)
description:
Контекст
- Экран: `OperOps -> Codex task details` (пример: https://copilot.stratospace.fun/operops/codex/task/copilot-7r94.1)
- В блоке `Issue ID` ID отображается как синий линк + есть кнопка копирования.
- В блоке `Relationships` ID задач визуально не в том же формате.

Задача
Сделать отображение ID в `Relationships` таким же, как в `Issue ID`:
1) синий кликабельный линк на `/operops/codex/task/<issue-id>`
2) кнопка копирования ID рядом
3) единый визуальный компонент/стиль для обоих мест (Issue ID и Relationships)

Дополнительно
Добавить короткую пиктограмму (emoji) статуса перед relationship item:
- `open` -> `⚪` (серый)
- `in_progress` -> `🟡`
- `blocked` -> `⛔`
- `deferred` -> `💤`
- `closed` -> `✅`
- fallback (неизвестный статус) -> `❔`

Техобласть (ориентир)
- `app/src/components/codex/CodexIssueDetailsCard.tsx`
- при необходимости вынести общий render-хелпер/компонент для issue id token.

Зачем
- Убрать визуальную неоднородность в карточке задачи.
- Ускорить навигацию по связанным задачам.
- Сразу видеть статус связей без чтения текста статуса.
acceptance_criteria: 1) В Relationships ID оформлены как синие ссылки на /operops/codex/task/<id> и имеют кнопку copy рядом. 2) Используется единый визуальный паттерн/компонент с Issue ID. 3) Перед каждым relationship item показывается emoji по статусу: open=⚪ (серый), in_progress=🟡, blocked=⛔, deferred=💤, closed=✅, fallback=❔. 4) Не ломается текущая навигация по related issues.
notes:
Implemented link+copy parity for Issue ID and Relationships in Codex issue details card, with status pictograms for relationship items.

Code:
- app/src/components/codex/CodexIssueDetailsCard.tsx:
  - added shared `renderIssueIdToken(issueId)` used in both `Issue ID` field and relationship rows.
  - unified ID rendering to blue link `/operops/codex/task/<id>` + copy control for both locations.
  - added relationship status pictogram mapping:
    - open=⚪ (gray)
    - in_progress=🟡
    - blocked=⛔
    - deferred=💤
    - closed=✅
    - fallback=❔
  - relationship parser now extracts status from dependency items (`status` / `state`).
- app/__tests__/operops/codexIssueDetailsCardContract.test.ts:
  - updated contract assertions for shared token renderer and status pictogram mapping.

Verification:
- cd app && npm run test -- __tests__/operops/codexIssueDetailsCardContract.test.ts __tests__/operops/codexIssuesTableContract.test.ts (PASS, 2 suites / 8 tests)
- cd app && npm run build (PASS)
- cd backend && npm run build (PASS)

title: [voice][migration] Verify sessions and migrate legacy possible-task payloads to canonical schema

title: Normalize task external_ref/source_ref semantics for Voice→OperOps→bd
description:
Implement the agreed normalization:
- automation_tasks._id is the only internal unique row identity
- task.external_ref = canonical source ref (voice session URL)
- task.source_ref = canonical self task URL (/operops/task/<mongo_id>)
- introduce bd_external_ref as a distinct bd sync key
- stop re-materializing the same accepted logical task; update existing row by lineage key instead

Acceptance:
1. Accepted Voice task materialization reuses existing rows by lineage key priority accepted_from_row_id > row_id > source_data.row_id > compatibility fallbacks.
2. task docs persist external_ref as source URL and source_ref as OperOps task URL.
3. bd sync uses bd_external_ref only.
4. Voice/CRM read helpers prefer external_ref for source linkage and source_ref for self-link.
5. Regression tests cover id non-uniqueness, accepted task reuse, source/self-link behavior, and bd sync reuse.
close_reason: Implemented normalized external_ref/source_ref/bd_external_ref semantics with lineage-based accepted task reuse; deployed and smoke-verified

title: Voice SessionPage: 404 incorrectly rendered as runtime mismatch
description:
## Проблема

При открытии страницы `/voice/session/:id` фронтенд показывает сообщение `Сессия недоступна в текущем runtime (prod/dev mismatch)` даже в кейсе, когда сессия реально отсутствует в БД (`Session not found`).

Это смешивает два разных состояния:
- `404 not found` (объект не существует);
- `409 runtime_mismatch` (объект существует, но не доступен в текущем runtime scope).

## Контекст и наблюдение

Пользовательский кейс с ID `6870c15d8b055b47afb956af`:
- изначально сессия отсутствовала в `automation_voice_bot_sessions`;
- UI показывал `prod/dev mismatch` вместо `не найдена`;
- это вводит в заблуждение и затрудняет диагностику целостности данных.

## Шаги воспроизведения (до фикса)

1. Взять валидный ObjectId, отсутствующий в `automation_voice_bot_sessions`.
2. Открыть страницу `https://copilot.stratospace.fun/voice/session/<id>`.
3. Наблюдать экран ошибки.

## Фактическое поведение

- UI для `404` ответа от `POST /voicebot/sessions/get` показывает: `Сессия недоступна в текущем runtime (prod/dev mismatch)`.

## Ожидаемое поведение

- Для `404` от `sessions/get`: показать `Сессия не найдена`.
- Для `409` runtime mismatch: показать `Сессия недоступна в текущем runtime (prod/dev mismatch)`.

## Технические находки

Frontend:
- `app/src/pages/voice/SessionPage.tsx:86-88`
  - Любой `404` интерпретируется как runtime mismatch.
- `app/src/store/voiceBotStore.ts:195`
  - В логировании `status === 404` помечается как `runtimeMismatch: true`.

Backend:
- `backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/sessions.ts:1075`
  - `POST /sessions/get` возвращает только `404 Session not found`, без отдельного `409 runtime_mismatch`.
- В другом роуте уже есть корректная дифференциация:
  - `backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/uploads.ts:383-396`
  - если документ существует, но не проходит runtime scope -> `409 runtime_mismatch`, иначе `404`.

## Тестовые примеры (должны покрываться после фикса)

### API тест 1: Not Found

Предусловие:
- `session_id` не существует в коллекции сессий.

Запрос:
- `POST /voicebot/sessions/get` с `{ "session_id": "<absent_object_id>" }`.

Ожидание:
- HTTP `404`;
- body содержит `Session not found`;
- UI текст: `Сессия не найдена`.

### API тест 2: Runtime Mismatch

Предусловие:
- сессия существует в raw DB;
- runtime_tag/семейство runtime не совпадает с текущим runtime.

Запрос:
- `POST /voicebot/sessions/get` с `{ "session_id": "<existing_mismatch_id>" }`.

Ожидание:
- HTTP `409`;
- body содержит `runtime_mismatch`;
- UI текст: `Сессия недоступна в текущем runtime (prod/dev mismatch)`.

### UI/E2E тесты

1. `@unauth`/`@auth` сценарий для `404`:
- открыть `/voice/session/<absent_id>`;
- убедиться, что НЕ показывается mismatch-текст;
- показывается `Сессия не найдена`.

2. сценарий для `409`:
- открыть `/voice/session/<mismatch_id>`;
- показывается именно mismatch-текст.

## Риск

Без исправления операторы и пользователи получают ложный диагноз (`runtime mismatch`) в кейсах реального отсутствия данных, что усложняет triage инцидентов и data-quality проверок.

## Предлагаемый scope фикса

1. На backend в `sessions/get` добавить дифференциацию `404` vs `409` по аналогии с `uploads.ts`.
2. На frontend в `SessionPage` и связанных слоях обрабатывать `409` как mismatch, `404` как not found.
3. Обновить/добавить e2e + unit тесты на обе ветки.
acceptance_criteria:
- sessions/get returns 404 only when session truly not found
- sessions/get returns 409 runtime_mismatch when session exists outside current runtime scope
- SessionPage shows "Сессия не найдена" for 404
- SessionPage shows "Сессия недоступна в текущем runtime (prod/dev mismatch)" for 409
- e2e covers both 404 and 409 branches
notes: Источник: ручная проверка orphan session_id и открытие /voice/session/:id; наблюдался false-positive mismatch для отсутствующей сессии. Временный stub для id 6870c15d8b055b47afb956af был создан только для data-investigation.

title: [voice][tasks] Keep session lifecycle filter order fixed instead of sparse status_counts-driven ordering
description:
Spec mismatch against plan/voice-task-surface-normalization-spec.md sections 7.2/7.3.

Current SessionPage derives the inner `Задачи` subtabs directly from backend `status_counts` and filters out zero-count entries. That means both presence and order of lifecycle filters are data-driven instead of contract-driven.

Expected by spec:
- fixed lifecycle axis inside `Задачи`: Draft, Ready, In Progress, Review, Done, Archive
- counts are inline, but the axis itself is stable and not dependent on which buckets are currently non-zero

This is separate from the zero-state bug because even non-empty sessions can still render a sparse/incomplete lifecycle axis instead of the full approved filter contract.
close_reason: Implemented, pushed, and live-verified via MCP on /voice/session/69b3fcffb00ed62d0c44a015: lifecycle filter order is fixed as Draft/Ready/In Progress/Review/Done/Archive instead of sparse status_counts-driven ordering.

title: [voice][create_tasks] garbage classifier mislabels valid_speech codes as garbage during full recompute
description:
Evidence from session 69d5ef3592a1eba4f34ab278:
- 9/16 message rows have garbage_detected=false and garbage_detection.code in {valid_speech, valid_russian_speech, valid_speech_ru, valid_short_phrase}.
- backend/src/services/voicebot/createTasksAgent.ts:isCreateTasksMessageGarbageFlagged() currently returns true for any garbage_detection.code other than ok/clear_speech, so these valid_* codes are treated as garbage.
- Direct probe on 2026-04-08 with nested transcription.text present still produced filteredMessages=0/rawTextChars=0 before create_tasks call because the helper discarded every row.

Impact:
- create_tasks full_recompute throws away valid transcript rows before task extraction.
- Worker falls back toward empty/rawless execution and no_task_reason_missing.

Acceptance:
1. valid_* detector codes are preserved as non-garbage.
2. Full recompute keeps the 9 valid chunks for session 69d5ef3592a1eba4f34ab278.
3. Regression coverage locks the helper semantics for true/false garbage codes.
close_reason: Completed

title: [webrtc][forensics] Persist Done→Start transition correlation on backend
description:
## Context
`copilot-9w1n` fixed race behavior and added client-side forensic trace fields (`transition_id`/`correlation_id`) in WebRTC runtime logs.

Post-review outcome: functional flow is `go`, but correlation remains mainly client-side. Backend request schemas/routes currently ignore trace fields.

## Problem
When investigating incidents, forensic continuity is weaker because server-side logs/events do not persist the same correlation id through the full Done→Start chain.

## Scope
- Extend backend request schema for:
  - `POST /api/voicebot/session_done`
  - `POST /api/voicebot/session`
- Accept optional trace fields (`transition_id`, `correlation_id`), normalize them, and include them in structured logs/events.
- Ensure the same id can be observed server-side for:
  - old session close
  - new session create
  - first recording attach/upload bound to new session
- Add backend tests for trace propagation.

## File surfaces
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/sessions.ts`
- `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/api/routes/voicebot/uploads.ts` (if needed for attach trace)
- related runtime/contract tests in `backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/*`

## Notes
Low-risk follow-up; not a deploy blocker for race fix itself.
acceptance_criteria: 1) session_done/create_session endpoints accept and validate optional transition_id|correlation_id. 2) Server logs/events persist the same correlation id across old_session_closed -> new_session_created -> recording_attached chain. 3) At least one runtime/contract test verifies backend-side trace continuity.
close_reason: Implemented backend forensic trace continuity across session_done -> create_session -> upload_audio with regression coverage and green backend gate.

comments.author: vp
comments.text:
Implemented backend Done→Start forensic trace continuity.

Changes:
1) sessions route contracts now accept optional transition/correlation on both /voicebot/session_done and /voicebot/create_session (zod schemas).
2) /voicebot/session_done now forwards transition_id/correlation_id into done-flow source metadata, so close-side notify/session-log events carry the same forensic id.
3) /voicebot/create_session now persists transition_id/correlation_id on the created session document and echoes them in REST response.
4) /voicebot/upload_audio now resolves effective trace ids from request payload OR session-level persisted ids and stamps them into: message top-level fields, file_metadata, socket new_message payload, upload response payload, and structured upload logs. Session document is also refreshed with latest transition/correlation on upload update path.

Test coverage added/updated:
- backend/__tests__/voicebot/session/sessionDoneRoute.test.ts: verifies transition/correlation are propagated to done-flow source.
- backend/__tests__/smoke/voicebotApiSmoke.test.ts: verifies create_session accepts/returns trace fields and persists them at insert.
- backend/__tests__/voicebot/runtime/uploadAudioRoute.test.ts: verifies first upload inherits trace ids from session and persists them into message + file_metadata.

Validation:
- NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --maxWorkers=1 __tests__/voicebot/session/sessionDoneRoute.test.ts __tests__/smoke/voicebotApiSmoke.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/runtime/uploadAudioRoute.test.ts => PASS (12 tests).
- BACKEND_JEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 npm run test:parallel-safe -- __tests__/voicebot/session/sessionDoneRoute.test.ts __tests__/smoke/voicebotApiSmoke.test.ts __tests__/voicebot/runtime/uploadAudioRoute.test.ts => PASS (full backend gate run by script, 135 suites / 680 tests).

title: [voice][categorization] unify text and voice preprocessing pipeline parity
description:
## Problem
Категоризация обрабатывает текстовые сессии иначе, чем voice-транскрипции: «причесывание»/нормализация текста в Categorization не совпадает с тем, как это делает pipeline для Transcription.

## Request
Нужен единый pipeline обработки независимо от источника материала:
- voice
- text upload/manual text chunks

Требование: «одинаковая семантика и одинаковый post-processing» для Categorization/Summary/Tasks при одинаковом содержании.

## Expected
1. Один канонический preprocessing/postprocessing слой для источников `voice` и `text`.
2. Для одинакового содержания результат категоризации должен быть эквивалентен по структуре и качеству.
3. Добавить регрессионный контракт-тест: pairwise voice-vs-text fixture -> одинаковые ключевые поля categorization output.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. Заведен и подключен общий preprocessing pipeline для обоих источников.
2. Добавлены тестовые фикстуры с идентичным контентом в voice/text вариантах.
3. Тесты подтверждают parity по categorization/materials/summary-ready payload.
4. Документировано, где именно источник влияет на обработку (если есть допустимые различия).
close_reason: Parity wave completed: web+TG text/attachment paths aligned with voice preprocessing/garbage fallback branches; stale no_task metadata clearing in recovery path; isolated and full backend test gates passed; postreview gpt-5.3-codex verdict GO.

title: [voice][notify] session_project_assigned webhook fails with 502 on call-actions notify endpoint
description:
Problem
Voice notify HTTP delivery for `session_project_assigned` is failing with upstream `502 Bad Gateway` on prod. Session log stores `notify_http_failed`, and worker logs confirm the external notify endpoint is returning non-2xx.

Severity
high

Observed on
- session `69c37a231f1bc03e330f9641`
- session log entries:
  - `notify_requested` at `2026-03-25 09:05:44`
  - `notify_http_failed` at `2026-03-25 09:21:59`

Runtime / config scope
- notify sender: `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/src/workers/voicebot/handlers/notifyHandler.ts:357-497`
- prod config: `/home/strato-space/copilot/backend/.env.production:86-87`
  - `VOICE_BOT_NOTIFIES_URL=https://call-actions.stratospace.fun/notify`
  - bearer token configured

Evidence
- worker log: `notify http failed` for event `session_project_assigned`, session `69c37a231f1bc03e330f9641`, status `502`
- manual reproduction using the configured URL/token returned the same `HTTP/2 502` nginx bad gateway response
- UI Log tab for the same session shows `notify_http_failed`

Localized behavior
`notifyHandler` is behaving correctly: it POSTs JSON envelope to `VOICE_BOT_NOTIFIES_URL`, logs the body on non-2xx, and writes `notify_http_failed` into session log. The defect is upstream availability/routing of the configured notify target, not the local sender branch.

Impact
- downstream systems waiting for session-project notify events do not receive them
- operators see error state in Voice session Log even when the rest of the pipeline continues
- hidden integration drift can accumulate because the local pipeline does not hard-fail the session

Repro
1. Open or assign a voice session project so `session_project_assigned` notify is emitted
2. Observe worker log entry `notify http failed`
3. Observe session log row `notify_http_failed`
4. Repeat manual POST to `https://call-actions.stratospace.fun/notify` with the configured bearer token
5. Receive `502 Bad Gateway`

Actual
Notify sender emits request, upstream endpoint responds `502`, session log records failure.

Expected
Configured notify target should accept the event with 2xx, and session log should record `notify_http_sent` instead of `notify_http_failed`.

Acceptance criteria
- `https://call-actions.stratospace.fun/notify` accepts the expected notify envelope for `session_project_assigned` on prod.
- Voice session log no longer records `notify_http_failed` for healthy notify flow.
- A smoke test or ops check exists for the configured notify endpoint.

comments.author: vp
comments.text:
Additional forensics 2026-03-25:
- session 69c36e111f1bc03e330f9633 also records the same upstream outage pattern, but for `session_done` rather than `session_project_assigned`. Worker log at 2026-03-25 09:22:00 shows `notify http failed` with status 502 for event `session_done`, and session log stores `notify_http_failed`.
- This suggests the defect is endpoint-level availability/drift on `VOICE_BOT_NOTIFIES_URL`, not a single-event serializer bug.

title: [voice][ops] add synthetic health probe for VOICE_BOT_NOTIFIES_URL upstream
description:
## Context
Ticket copilot-lnr4 is blocked by recurring upstream 502 on VOICE_BOT_NOTIFIES_URL. Local sender path is healthy; outage detection currently relies on manual forensic checks.

## Goal
Introduce synthetic probe + machine-readable diagnostics so upstream notify availability regressions are detected immediately after restart/deploy and during runtime.

## Scope
1. Add a lightweight probe command for configured VOICE_BOT_NOTIFIES_URL + bearer from backend env.
2. Return explicit status code/body class and latency in machine-readable output.
3. Integrate probe into operational smoke checklist after restart/deploy.
4. Keep probe safe (minimal test payload, no side effects beyond endpoint reachability check).

## Acceptance
- Probe command exists in repo scripts/docs.
- Probe reports non-2xx as failing exit code with structured diagnostic output.
- lnr4-style 502 is detectable in one command without manual curl reconstruction.
